switch-1(config)# vpc domain 30

switch-2# configure termina
()
switch-2(config-vpc-domain)# config-sync
switch-1# configure terminal
switch-1(config)# spanning-tree mode mst
switch-1# show running-config...spanning-tree mode mst...
switch-2# show running-config...spanning-tree mode mst...
switch-2# configure terminal
switch-2(config)# spanning-tree port type
switch-2 default
switch-1# show running-config...spanning-tree port type network default...
switch-2# show running-config...spanning-tree port type network default...

switch-1# configure terminal
switch-1(config)# interface eth1/1
switch-1(config-if)# vpc 100
switch-2# configure terminal
switch-2(config)# interface eth2/3
switch-2(config-if)# vpc 100

switch-1# configure terminal
switch-1(config)# interface eth1/1
switch-1(config-if)# vpc 100 symmetric
switch-2# configure terminal
switch-2(config)# interface eth1/1
switch-1# show running-config interface eth1/10interface ethernet1/1 switchport switchport mode tr
switch-2# show running-config interface eth1/10interface ethernet1/1 switchport switchport mode tr

switch-1# configure terminal
switch-1(config)# interface port-channel 10
switch-1(config-if)# switchpo
switch-2# show running-config interface po10interface port-channel10 switchport vpc 10
switch-2# configure terminal
switch-2(config)# interface port-channel 10
switch-2(config-if)# switchpo
switch-1# show running-config interface port-channel 10interface port-channel10 switchport switchp
switch-2# show running-config interface port-channel 10interface port-channel10 switchport switchp

Configuring Ethernet OAM
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# feature ethernet-link-oam
switch(config)# ethernet oam profile Profile_1
switch(config-eoam)#
switch(config-eoam)# hello-interval 100ms
switch(config-eoam-lm)#
switch(config-eoam)# link-monitor
switch(config-eoam-lm)#
switch(config-eoam-lm)# symbol-period window 60000
switch(config-eoam-lm)# symbol-period threshold low 10000000 high 60000000
switch(config-eoam-lm)# frame window 60
switch(config-eoam-lm)# frame threshold low 10000000 high 60000000
switch(config-eoam-lm)# frame-period window 60000
switch(config-eoam-lm)# frame-period threshold low 100 high 1000000
switch(config-eoam-lm)# frame-seconds window 900000
switch(config-eoam-lm)# frame-seconds threshold 3 threshold 900
switch(config-eoam-lm)# exit
switch(config-eoam)#
switch(config-eoam)# connection timeout 30
switch(config-eoam)# mode passive
switch(config-eoam)# require-remote
switch(config-eoam-require)#
switch(config-eoam-require)# mode active
switch(config-eoam-require)# link-monitoring
switch(config-eoam-require)# exit
switch(config-eoam)#
switch(config-eoam)# action
switch(config-eoam-action)#
switch(config-eoam-action)# capabilities-conflict disable
switch(config-eoam-action)# critical-event error-disable-interface
switch(config-eoam-action)# discovery-timeout disable
switch(config-eoam-action)# dying-gasp error-disable-interface
switch(config-eoam-action)# high-threshold error-disable-interface
switch(config-eoam-action)# remote-loopback disable
switch(config-eoam-action)# session-down error-disable-interface
switch(config-eoam-action)# session-up disable
switch(config-eoam-action)# uni-directional link-fault disable
switch(config-eoam-action)# wiring-conflict disable
switch(config-eoam-action)# end

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface ethernet 3/1
switch(config-if)# ethernet oam
switch(config-if-eoam)#
switch(config-if-eoam)# profile Profile_1
switch(config-if-eoam)# end

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface ethernet 3/1
switch(config-if)# ethernet oam
switch(config-if-eoam)#
switch(config-if-eoam)# hello-interval 1s
switch(config-if-eoam)# mode passive
switch(config-if-eoam)# end

switching_config_guide_8x/config_layer_2.html">Configuring Layer 2 Switching
switch# config t
switch(config)# mac address-table static 1.1.1 vlan 2 interface ethernet 1/2
switch(config)# exit
switch# show mac address-table static
switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# interface ethernet 7/3
switch(config-if)# mac-address 22ab.47dd.ff89
switch(config-if)# exit
switch# show interface ethernet 7/3
switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# mac address-table aging-time 600
switch(config)# exit
switch# show mac address-table aging-time
switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# mac address-table learning-mode conversational vlan1
switch(config)# exit

switch# config t
switch(config)# mac address loop-detect flow-control-fe global-thresh-time 5 global-thresh-count 500
switch(config)# mac address-table loop-detect flow-control-fe threshold-time 5 threshold-count 500
switch(config)# mac address loop-detect disable-learn-vlan global-thresh-time 5 global-thresh-count
switch(config)# mac address loop-detect flow-control-fe threshold-time 5 threshold-count 500
switch(config)# mac address throttle-buffer-intv max
switch(config)# mac address throttle-buffer-intv optimal
switch(config)# exit

switch# show forwarding consistency l2 7

switch# clear mac address-table dynamic
switch# show mac address-table

switching_config_guide_8x/config_vlans.html">Configuring VLANs
switch(config)# system vlan 2000 reserve This will delete all configs on vlans 2000-2127. Continue

switch# config t
switch(config)# vlan 5
switch(config-vlan)# exit
switch# show vlan
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# vlan 5
switch(config-vlan)# exit
switch# show vlan
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# vlan 5
switch(config-vlan)# name accounting
switch(config-vlan)# state active
switch(config-vlan)# no shutdown
switch(config-vlan)# exit
switch# show vlan
switch# show vtp status
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# system vlan 3968 reserve
switch(config)# copy running-configstartup-config
switch(config)# reload
switch(config)# show system vlan reserved

switch# config t
switch(config)# vlan configuration 20

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# system vlan long-name
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config
switch(config)# show running-config | sec long-name

switching_config_guide_8x/config_vtp.html">Configuring VTP
Device(config)# vtp password helping hiddenGenerating the secret associated to the password.Device#
Device(config)# vtp password 89914640C8D90868B6A0D8103847A733 secret
Device# exit
Device# show vtp pas
Device# vtp primary vlanEnter VTP password: This switch is becoming Primary server for vlan feature
Device# show vtp devicesGathering information from the domain, please wait.VTP Database Conf switch

switching_config_guide_8x/config_pvlans.html">Configuring Private VLANs Using NX-OS
switch# config t
switch(config)# feature private-vlan
switch(config)# exit
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# vlan 5
switch(config-vlan)# private-vlan primary
switch(config-vlan)# exit
switch# show vlan private-vlan
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# vlan 5
switch(config-vlan)# private-vlan association 100-105,109
switch(config-vlan)# exit
switch# show vlan private-vlan
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# interface vlan 5
switch(config-if)# private-vlan mapping 100-105, 109
switch(config-if)# exit
switch(config)# show interface vlan 101 private-vlan mapping
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# interface ethernet 2/1
switch(config-if)# switchport mode private-vlan host
switch(config-if)# switchport private-vlan host-association 10 50
switch(config-if)# exit
switch# show interface switchport
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# interface ethernet 2/11
switch(config-if)# switchport
switch(config-if)# switchport mode private-vlan trunk secondary
switch(config-if)# switchport private-vlan trunk native vlan 5
switch(config-if)# switchport private-vlan trunk allowed vlan add 1
switch(config-if)# switchport private-vlan association trunk 10 101
switch(config-if)# exit
switch# show interface switchport
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# interface ethernet 2/1
switch(config-if)# switchport mode private-vlan promiscuous
switch(config-if)# switchport private-vlan mapping 10 50
switch(config-if)# exit
switch# show interface switchport
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# interface ethernet 2/1
switch(config-if)# switchport
switch(config-if)# switchport mode private-vlan trunk promiscuous
switch(config-if)# switchport private-vlan trunk native vlan 5
switch(config-if)# switchport private-vlan trunk allowed vlan add 1
switch(config-if)# switchport private-vlan mapping trunk 4 add 5
switch(config-if)# exit
switch# show interface switchport
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switching_config_guide_8x/config_rapid_pvst.html">Configuring Rapid PVST+ Using Cisco NX-OS
switch# config t
switch(config)# spanning-tree mode rapid-pvst
switch(config)# exit
switch# show running-config spanning-tree all
switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# spanning-tree vlan 5
switch(config)# exit
switch# show spanning-tree
switch# copy running-config startup-config

Error: Failed to set root bridge for VLAN 1It may be possible to make the bridge root by setting the

switch# config t
switch(config)# spanning-tree vlan 5 root primary diameter 4
switch(config)# exit
switch# show spanning-tree
switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# spanning-tree vlan 5 root secondary diameter 4
switch(config)# exit
switch# show spanning-tree vlan 5
switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# spanning-tree vlan 5 priority 8192
switch(config)# exit
switch# show spanning-tree vlan 5
switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# interface ethernet 1/4
switch(config-if)# spanning-tree port-priority 160
switch(config-if)# exit
switch# show spanning-tree interface ethernet 2/10
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# spanning-tree pathcost method long
switch(config)# interface ethernet 1/4
switch(config-if)
switch(config-if)# spanning-tree cost 1000
switch(config-if)# exit
switch# show spanning-tree pathcost method
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# spanning-tree vlan 5 hello-time 7
switch(config)# exit
switch# show spanning-tree vlan 5
switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# spanning-tree vlan 5 forward-time 21
switch(config)# exit
switch# show spanning-tree vlan 5
switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# spanning-tree vlan 5 max-age 36
switch(config)# exit
switch# show spanning-tree vlan 5
switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# interface ethernet 1/4
switch(config-if)# spanning-tree link-type point-to-point
switch(config-if)# exit
switch# show spanning-tree
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# clear spanning-tree detected-protocol

switching_config_guide_8x/config_mst.html">Configuring MST Using Cisco NX-OS
switch# config t
switch(config)# spanning-tree mode mst
switch(config)# exit
switch# show running-config spanning-tree all
switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# spanning-tree mst configuration
switch(config-mst)#
switch(config-mst)# exit
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# spanning-tree mst configuration
switch(config-mst)#
switch(config-mst)# name accounting
switch(config-mst)# exit
switch# show spanning-tree mst
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# spanning-tree mst configuration
switch(config-mst)#
switch(config-mst)# revision 5
switch(config-mst)# exit
switch# show spanning-tree mst
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# spanning-tree mst configuration
switch(config-mst)#
switch(config-mst)# instance 1 vlan 10-20
switch(config-mst)# name region1
switch(config-mst)# revision 1
switch(config-mst)# exit
switch# show spanning-tree mst
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# spanning-tree mst configuration
switch(config-mst)#
switch(config-mst)# instance 3 vlan 200
switch(config-mst)# exit
switch# show spanning-tree mst
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# spanning-tree mst configuration
switch(config-mst)#
switch(config-mst)# private-vlan synchronize
switch(config-mst)# exit
switch# show spanning-tree mst
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# spanning-tree mst 5 root primary
switch(config)# exit
switch# show spanning-tree mst
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# spanning-tree mst 5 root secondary
switch# exit
switch# show spanning-tree mst
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# spanning-tree mst 5 priority 4096
switch(config)# exit
switch# show spanning-tree mst
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# interface ethernet 3/1
switch(config-if)# spanning-tree mst 3 port-priority 64
switch(config-if)# exit
switch# show spanning-tree mst
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch# config t
switch(config)# interface ethernet 3/1
switch(config-if)# spanning-tree mst 4 cost 17031970
switch(config-if)# exit
switch# show spanning-tree mst
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# spanning-tree mst hello-time 1
switch(config)# exit
switch# show spanning-tree mst
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# spanning-tree mst forward-time 10
switch(config)# exit
switch# show spanning-tree mst
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# spanning-tree mst max-age 40
switch(config)# exit
switch# show spanning-tree mst
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# spanning-tree mst max-hops 40
switch(config-mst)# exit
switch# show spanning-tree mst
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# interface ethernet 1/4
switch(config-if)# spanning-tree link-type point-to-point
switch(config-if)# exit
switch# show spanning-tree
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# clear spanning-tree detected-protocol

Preparing for Integrating Cisco RISE with Cisco Prime NAM
Configuring Cisco RISE with Cisco Prime NAM
Preface
New and Changed Information
Cisco RISE Integration Overview
Preparing for RISE Integration
Configuring RISE
login as: nsrootUsing keyboard-interactive authentication.Password:Last login: Tue Jun 16 10:37:28 2

set ns config -ipaddress 10.102.29.60 -netmask 255.255.255.0save ns

set ns config -nsvlan 300 -ifnum 1/1 1/2 1/3 -tagged NOsave config
set ns config -nsvlan 300 -ifnum 1/1 1/2 1/3 -tagged NOsave config

set ns config -ipaddress 10.102.29.60 -netmask 255.255.255.0save ns

set ns config -nsvlan 300 -ifnum 1/1 1/2 1/3 -tagged NOsave config
set ns config -nsvlan 300 -ifnum 1/1 1/2 1/3 -tagged NOsave config

Configuring Auto Policy-Based Routing
set ns config -ipaddress 10.102.29.60 -netmask 255.255.255.0save ns

set ns config -nsvlan 300 -ifnum 1/1 1/2 1/3 -tagged NOsave config
set ns config -nsvlan 300 -ifnum 1/1 1/2 1/3 -tagged NOsave config

> add service svc12 192.168.12.23 http 80 -usip YES
> set service svc12 -usip YES
unset service svc12

> add serviceGroup svc_grp_1 http 80 -usip YES
> bind serviceGroup svc_grp_1 192.168.14.12 80> bind serviceGroup svc_grp_1 192.168.14.13 80> bind s
> set serviceGroup svc_grp_1
unset serviceGroup svc_grp_1

> enable ns mode USIP Done> add service svc_gl 192.168.12.72 http 80 Done

Troubleshooting RISE Integration
switch# show rise detailRISE module name: ns21 State: inactiveinactive reason: Control VLAN int

RISE-mpx> show rise profile1) ProfileName: profile_331 IPAddress: 3.101.0.10 Mode:

Preface
New and Changed Information
Overview
Configuring CFS
Configuring NTP
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# feature ntp
switch(config)# show ntp statusDistribution: EnabledLast operational state: Fabric Locked
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config tEnter configuration commands, one per line. End with CNTL/Z.switch(config)#
switch(config)# interface ethernet 6/1
switch(config-if)# ntp disable ip
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ntp master
switch(config)# show running-config ntp
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ntp server 192.0.2.10
switch(config)# ntp peer 2001:0db8::4101
switch(config)# show ntp peers
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ntp authentication-key 42 md5 aNiceKey
switch(config)# show ntp authentication-keys
switch# config tEnter configuration commands, one per line. End with CNTL/Z.switch(config)# ntp auth
switch(config)# show ntp trusted-keys
switch(config)# ntp authenticate
switch(config)# show ntp authentication-status
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ntp access-group peer accesslist1
switch(config)# show ntp access-groups
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ntp source 192.0.2.1
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ntp source-interface ethernet 2/1
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config tEnter configuration commands, one per line. End with CNTL/Z.switch(config)#
switch(config)# interface ethernet 6/1
switch(config-if)# ntp broadcast destination 192.0.2.10
switch(config-if)# exit
switch(config)# ntp broadcastdelay 100
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config tEnter configuration commands, one per line. End with CNTL/Z.switch(config)#
switch(config)# interface ethernet 6/1
switch(config-if)# ntp multicast FF02:1::FF0E:8C6C
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config tEnter configuration commands, one per line. End with CNTL/Z.switch(config)#
switch(config)# interface ethernet 6/1
switch(config-if)# ntp multicast FF02:1::FF0E:8C6C
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ntp logging
switch(config)# show ntp logging-status
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

Configuring PTP
Configuring CDP
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# cdp enable
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface ethernet 1/2
switch(config-if)# cdp enable
switch(config-if)# show cdp interface ethernet 1/2
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# cdp advertise v1
switch(config)# cdp format device-id mac-address
switch(config)# cdp holdtime 150
switch(config)# cdp timer 50
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

Configuring System Message Logging
switch# terminal monitor
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# logging console 3
switch(config)# show logging console
switch(config)# logging monitor 3
switch(config)# show logging monitor
switch(config)# logging message interface type ethernet description
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# logging logfile my_log 6
switch# logging event link-status default
switch(config)# show logging info
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# logging module 3
switch(config)# show logging module
switch(config)# logging level aaa 2
switch(config)# show logging level aaa
switch(config)# logging timestamp milliseconds
switch(config)# show logging timestamp
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# logging server 192.0.2.253
switch(config)# logging server 2001:db8::3 5 use-vrf red
switch(config)# logging source-interface loopback 5
switch(config)# show logging server
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# logging server 192.0.2.253 port 600
switch(config)# logging server 192.0.2.253 5 port 600
switch(config)# show logging server
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

debug.local7 var/log/myfile.log
$ touch /var/log/myfile.log$ chmod 666 /var/log/myfile.log
$ kill -HUP ~cat /etc/syslog.pid~

switch# show logging last 40
switch# show logging logfile start-time 2013 oct 1 15:10:0
switch# show logging nvram last 10
switch# clear logging logfile
switch# clear logging nvram

Configuring Smart Call Home
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# snmp-server contact personname@companyname.com
switch(config)# callhome
switch(config-callhome)#
switch(config-callhome)# email-contact admin@Mycompany.com
switch(config-callhome)# phone-contact +1-800-123-4567
switch(config-callhome)# streetaddress 123 Anystreet st. Anytown,AnyWhere
switch(config-callhome)# contract-id Contract5678
switch(config-callhome)# customer-id Customer123456
switch(config-callhome)# site-id Site1
switch(config-callhome)# switch-priority 3
switch(config-callhome)# commit
switch(config-callhome)# show callhome
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# callhome
switch(config-callhome)#
switch(config-callhome)# destination-profile Noc101
switch(config-callhome)# destination-profile Noc101 format full-txt
switch(config-callhome)# commit
switch(config-callhome)# show callhome destination-profile profile Noc101
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# callhome
switch(config-callhome)#
switch(config-callhome)# destination-profile full-txt-destination email-addr person@place.com
switch(config-callhome)# destination-profile CiscoTAC-1 http http://site.com/service/callhome
switch(config-callhome)# destination-profile CiscoTAC-1 transport-method http
switch(config-callhome)# destination-profile full-txt-destination message-level 5
switch(config-callhome)# destination-profile full-txt-destination message-size 100000
switch(config-callhome)# commit
switch(config-callhome)# show callhome destination-profile profile full-text-destination
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# callhome
switch(config-callhome)#
switch(config-callhome)# destination-profile Noc101 alert-group All
switch(config-callhome)# commit
switch(config-callhome)# show callhome destination-profile profile Noc101
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# callhome
switch(config-callhome)#
switch(config-callhome)# alert-group Configuration user-def-cmd show ip route
switch(config-callhome)# commit
switch(config-callhome)# show callhome user-def-cmds
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# callhome
switch(config-callhome)#
switch(config-callhome)# transport email mail-server 192.0.2.1 use-vrf Red
switch(config-callhome)# transport email from person@company.com
switch(config-callhome)# transport email reply-to person@company.com
switch(config-callhome)# commit
switch(config-callhome)# show callhome transport
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# callhome
switch(config-callhome)#
switch(config-callhome)# transport http use-vrf Blue
switch(config-callhome)# commit
switch(config-callhome)# show callhome
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# callhome
switch(config-callhome)#
switch(config-callhome)# transport http proxy server 192.0.2.1
switch(config-callhome)# transport http proxy enable
switch(config-callhome)# commit
switch(config-callhome)# show callhome transport
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# callhome
switch(config-callhome)#
switch(config-callhome)# periodic-inventory notification interval 20
switch(config-callhome)# commit
switch(config-callhome)# show callhome
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# callhome
switch(config-callhome)#
switch(config-callhome)# no duplicate-message throttle
switch(config-callhome)# commit
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# callhome
switch(config-callhome)#
switch(config-callhome)# enable
switch(config-callhome)# commit
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal

switch(config-callhome)#
switch(config-callhome)# callhome send diagnostic
switch(config-callhome)# callhome test

switch# show checkpoint stable

switch# show diff rollback-patch checkpoint stable running-config
switch# rollback running-config checkpoint stable

Configuring Session Manager
switch# configure session myACLs
switch(config-s)#
switch(config-s)# show configuration session myACLs
switch(config-s)# save bootflash:sessions/myACLs

switch# configure session myacls
switch(config-s)#
switch(config-s)# ip access-list acl1
switch(config-s-acl)#
switch(config-s-acl)# permit tcp any any
switch(config-s-acl)# interface e 2/1
switch(config-s-if)#
switch(config-s-if)# ip access-group acl1 in
switch(config-s)# show configuration session myacls

switch(config-s)# verify

switch(config-s)# commit

switch(config-s)# save bootflash:sessions/myACLs

switch(config-s)# abort

switch(config)# snmp-server user Admin auth sha abcd1234 priv abcdefgh

switch(config)# snmp-server user Admin enforcePriv
switch(config)# snmp-server globalEnforcePriv

switch(config)# snmp-server community public ro
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# snmp-server community public use-ipv4acl myacl
switch(config)# snmp-server community public use-ipv4acl myacl
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch(config)# snmp-server host 192.0.2.1 informs version 2c public
switch(config)# snmp-server host 192.0.2.1 informs version 3 auth NMS

switch(config)# snmp-server host 192.0.2.1 filter-vrf Red

switch(config)# show snmp host

switch(config-if)# no snmp trap link-status

switch(config)# no snmp-server counter cache enable

Configuring Online Diagnostics
Configuring the Embedded Event Manager
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# event manager environment emailto admin@anyplace.com
switch(config)# show event manager environment all
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# event manager applet monitorShutdown
switch(config-applet)#
switch(config-applet)# description Monitors interface shutdown.
switch(config-applet)# event cli match conf t ; interface * ; shutdown
switch(config-applet)# tag one or two happens 1 in 10000
switch(config-applet)# action 1.0 cli show interface e 3/1
switch(config-applet)# show event manager policy-state monitorShutdown
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch(config-applet)# event applicationsub-system 798 type 1
switch(config-applet)# event cli match conf t ; interface * ; shutdown
switch(config-applet)# event counter namemycounter entry-val 20 gt
switch(config-applet)# event fanabsent time300
switch(config-applet)# event fanbad time3000
switch(config-applet)# event fib adjacencyextra
switch(config-applet)# event gold failure-type module 2test 7 ASICRegisterCheck testing-typeondemand
switch(config-applet)# event interfaceethernet 2/2 parameter
switch(config-applet)# event memorycritical
switch(config-applet)# event module statusoffline module all
switch(config-applet)# event module-failuretype lc-failed module 3 count 1
switch(config-applet)# event none
switch(config-applet)# event oir fan remove4
switch(config-applet)# event policy-defaultcount 3
switch(config-applet)# eventpoweroverbudget
switch(config-applet)# event snmp oid1.3.6.1.2.1.31.1.1.1.6 get-type nextentry-op lt 300 entry-val 0
switch(config-applet)# event storm-control
switch(config-applet)# event syslog period500
switch(config-applet)# event sysmgr memoryminor 80
switch(config-applet)# event sysmgr
switchover count 10 time 1000
switch(config-applet)# event temperaturemodule 2 threshold any
switch(config-applet)# event timer absolutetime 100 name abtimer
switch(config-applet)# event track 1 statedown

switch(config-applet)# action 1.0 clishow interface e 3/1
switch(config-applet)# action 2.0 countername mycounter value 20 op inc
switch(config-applet)# action 1.0 event-default
switch(config-applet)# action 1.0 forceshut module 2 reset-reason flapping links
switch(config-applet)# action 1.0overbudgetshut module 3-5
switch(config-applet)# action 1.0 policy-default
switch(config-applet)# action 1.0 publish-event
switch(config-applet)# action 1.0 reloadmodule 3-5
switch(config-applet)# action 1.0 snmp-trapstrdata temperature problem
switch(config-applet)# action 1.0 syslogpriority notifications msg cpu high
switch(config-applet)# action 1.0 end
switch(config-applet)# action 1.0 exit 25
switch(config-applet)# action 1.0 else
switch(config-applet)# action 1.0 elseif $x ge 10
switch(config-applet)# action 1.0 if $x lt 10
switch(config-applet)# action 2.0 if $x lt 10 goto 1.0
switch(config-applet)# action 2.0 puts "Hello world"
switch(config-applet)# action 2.0 add $var1 10
switch(config-applet)# action 1.0 decrement $varname 12
switch(config-applet)# action 2.0 increment $varname 12
switch(config-applet)# action 2.0 multiply 12 35
switch(config-applet)# action 2.0 subtract $var1 $var2
switch(config-applet)# action 2.0 comment keyvalue
switch(config-applet)# action 2.0 break
switch(config-applet)# action 2.0 continue
switch(config-applet)# action 3.1 foreach _iterator "orange blue green"
switch(config-applet)# action 3.2 while $i lt 10

switch(config-applet)# action 4.2 append $var 12
switch(config-applet)# action 4.3 regexp "(.*) (.*) (.*)" "one two three" _match _sub1
switch(config-applet)# action 4.5 string compare nocase length 3
switch(config-applet)# action 4.5 string equal "contains" "data"
switch(config-applet)# action 4.6 string first "contains" $str
switch(config-applet)# action 4.7 string index "this is a test" 6
switch(config-applet)# action 4.9 string last "contains" $str
switch(config-applet)# action 5.0 string length "contains"
switch(config-applet)# action 5.2 string match "*Bl*" $str
switch(config-applet)# action 5.2 string range "$data" 4 9
switch(config-applet)# action 5.4 string replace $str 1 4 "test"
switch(config-applet)# action 5.5 string tolower "$string" 11 16
switch(config-applet)# action 5.6 string toupper "$string" 0 7
switch(config-applet)# action 5.7 string trim "$string"
switch(config-applet)# action 5.7 string trimleft "$string" "Hello"
switch(config-applet)# action 5.7 string trimright "this is a testtest" "test"
switch(config-applet)# action 6.0 set $string "Container"

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# event manager policy moduleScript
switch(config)# show event manager policy internal moduleScript
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# event manager scheduler applet thread class default number 2
switch(config)# event manager scheduler script thread class A B range D-E number 1
switch# event manager scheduler clear policy 2
switch# event manager scheduler hold policy 2
switch# event manager scheduler modify all class A
switch# event manager scheduler release all

switch# configure terminal
switch(config-applet)# show event manager policy-state __ethpm_link_flap Policy __ethpm_link_flapCfg
switch(config)# event manager applet ethport override __ethpm_link_flap
switch(config-applet)#
description Overrides link flap policy.
switch(config-applet)# event policy-default count 2 time 1000
switch(config-applet)# action 1.0 syslog priority warnings msg Link is flapping.
switch(config-applet)# show event manager policy-state ethport
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# system memory-thresholds minor 60 severe 70 critical 80
switch(config)# system memory-thresholds threshold critical no-process-kill
switch(config-applet)# show running-config | include system memory
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# event manager applet abc
switch(config-applet)#
switch(config-applet)# event syslog occurs 10
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

Configuring Onboard Failure Logging
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# hw-module logging onboardModule: 7 Enabling ... was successful.Module: 10 Enabling .
switch(config)# hw-module logging onboard counter-statsModule: 7 Enabling counter-stats ... was succ
switch(config)# hw-module logging onboard cpuhogModule: 7 Enabling cpu-hog ... was successful.Module
switch(config)# hw-module logging onboard environmental-historyModule: 7 Enabling environmental-hist
switch(config)# hw-module logging onboard error-statsModule: 7 Enabling error-stats ... was successf
switch(config)# hw-module logging onboard interrupt-statsModule: 7 Enabling interrupt-stats ... was
switch(config)# hw-module logging onboard module 7Module: 7 Enabling ... was successful.
switch(config)# hw-module logging onboard obfl-logsModule: 7 Enabling obfl-log ... was successful.Mo
switch(config)# show logging onboard
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

Configuring SPAN
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface ethernet 2/5
switch(config-if)# switchport
switch(config-if)# switchport mode trunk
switch(config-if)# switchport monitor
switch(config)# no monitor session 3
switch(config)# monitor session 3 rx
switch(config-monitor)#
switch(config)# monitor session 3 tx
switch(config-monitor)#
switch(config)# monitor session 3 shut
switch(config-monitor)#
switch(config-monitor)# mode extended
switch(config-monitor)# description my_span_session_3
switch(config-monitor)# source interface ethernet 2/1-3, ethernet 3/1 rx
switch(config-monitor)# source interface port-channel 2
switch(config-monitor)# source interface sup-eth 0 both
switch(config-monitor)# source vlan 3, 6-8 rx
switch(config-monitor)# source interface ethernet 101/1/1-3
switch(config-monitor)# source interface all rx
switch(config-monitor)# filter vlan 3-5, 7
switch(config-monitor)# destination interface ethernet 2/5, ethernet 3/7
switch(config-monitor)# no shut
switch(config-monitor)# show monitor session 3
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

Configuring ERSPAN
Configuring LLDP
Configuring NetFlow
switch# config tEnter configuration commands, one per line. End with CNTL/Z.switch(config)#
switch(config)# flow record Test
switch(config-flow-record)#
switch(config-flow-record)# description Ipv4Flow
switch(config-flow-record)# match transport destination-port
switch(config-flow-record)# collect counter packets
switch(config-flow-exporter)# show flow record netflow protocol-port
switch(config-flow-exporter)# copy running-config startup-config

switch(config-flow-record)# match ip protocol
switch(config-flow-record)# match ipv4 destination address
switch(config-flow-record)# match ipv6 flow label
switch(config-flow-record)# match transport destination-port
switch(config-flow-record)# match datalink ethertype

switch(config-flow-record)# switch(config-flow-record)# collect counter packets
switch(config-flow-record)# collect flow sampler
switch(config-flow-record)# collect timestamp sys-uptime last
switch(config-flow-record)# collect transport tcp flags
switch(config-flow-record)# collect ip version

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# flow exporter flow-exporter-one
switch(config-flow-exporter)# destination 192.0.2.1
switch(config-flow-exporter)# source ethernet 2/1
switch(config-flow-exporter)# description exportversion9
switch(config-flow-exporter)# dscp 0
switch(config-flow-exporter)# transport udp 200
switch(config-flow-exporter)# version 9
switch(config-flow-exporter-version-9)# option exporter-stats timeout 1200
switch(config-flow-exporter-version-9)# template data timeout 1200
switch(config-flow-exporter-version-9)# exit
switch(config-flow-exporter)# exit
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# flow monitor flow-monitor-one
switch(config-flow-monitor)# description IPv4Monitor
switch(config-flow-monitor)# export v9
switch(config-flow-monitor)# record IPv4Flow
switch(config-flow-monitor)# exit
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# sampler testsampler
switch(config-flow-sampler)# description samples
switch(config-flow-sampler)# mode 1 out-of 128
switch(config-flow-sampler)# exit
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface ethernet 2/1
switch(config-if)# ip flow monitor testmonitor input sampler testsampler
switch(config-if)# ipv6 flow monitor testmonitorv6 input sampler testsamplerv6
switch(config-if)# layer2-switched flow monitor testmonitorl2 input sampler testsamplerl2
switch(config-if)# exit
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# vlan configuration 30
switch(config-vlan-config)# ip flow monitor testmonitor input sampler testsampler
switch(config-vlan-config)# exit
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminalEnter configuration commands, one per line. End with CNTL/Z.
switch(config)# flow record L2_record
switch(config-flow-record)# match datalink ethertype
switch(config-flow-record)# interface Ethernet 6/3
switch(config-if)# switchport
switch(config-if)# mac packet-classify
switch(config-vlan)# layer2-switched flow monitor L2_monitor input sampler L2_sampler
switch(config-if# show flow record netflow layer2-switched input
switch(config-vlan)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# flow timeout 30
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

Configuring EEE
Configuring GIR (Cisco NX-OS Release 7.3(0)D1(1) and later releases)
Configuring iCAM
Performing Software Maintenance Upgrades
switch# show install active
switch# show module
switch# show clock
Device# show install pkg-info n7700-s2- dk9.7.2.0.D1.1.CSCuo07721.bin

switch# copy tftp://10.1.1.1/images/n7700-s2-dk9.7.2.0.D1.1.CSCuo07721.bin bootflash:
switch# copy ftp://john:secret@10.1.1.1/images/n7700-s2-dk9.7.2.0.D1.1.CSCuo07721.bin bootflash:
switch# copysftp://10.1.1.1/images n7700-s2-dk9.7.2.0.D1.1.CSCuo07721.bin bootflash:
switch# copy scp://john@10.1.1.1//download/n7700-s2-dk9.7.2.0.D1.1.CSCuo07721.bin bootflash:n7700-s2

switch# install add bootflash:n7700-s2-dk9.7.2.0.D1.1.CSCuo07721.bin
switch# show install inactive
switch# install activate n7700-s2- dk9.7.2.0.D1.1.CSCuo07721.binInstall operation 158 completed succ
switch# show install active

switch# install commit n7700-s2-dk9.7.2.0.D1.1.CSCuo07721.bin
switch# show install committed

switch# install deactivate n7700-s2-dk9.7.2.0.D1.1.CSCuo07721.bin
switch# show install inactive
switch# install commit
switch# install remove n7700-s2- dk9.7.2.0.D1.1.CSCuo07721.binProceed with removing n7700-s2- dk9.7.
switch# install remove inactive Proceed with removing? (y/n)? [n] y

Converting CLI Commands to Network Configuration Format
IETF RFCs supported by Cisco NX-OS System Management
Embedded Event Manager System Events and Configuration Examples
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# track 1 interface ethernet 3/23
switch(config-track)# end
switch(config)# event manager applet track_3_23_down
switch(config-applet)# event track 1 state downs
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# event manager applet track_3_23_up
switch(config-applet)# e

RFCs
New and Changed Information
Configuring Locator ID Separation Protocol
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# feature lisp

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip lisp itr
switch(config)# ipv6 lisp itr
switch(config)# ip lisp etr
switch(config)# ipv6 lisp etr
switch(config)# ip lisp itr-etr
switch(config)# ipv6 lisp itr-etr
switch(config)# ip lisp itr map-resolver 10.10.10.1
switch(config)# ipv6 lisp itr map-resolver 10.10.10.1
switch(config)# ip lisp database-mapping 10.10.10.0/24 172.16.1.1 priority 1 weight 100
switch(config)# ipv6 lisp database-mapping 2001:db8:bb::/48 172.16.1.1 priority 1 weight 100
switch(config)# ip lisp etr map-server 172.16.1.2 key 0 123456789
switch(config)# ipv6 lisp etr map-server 172.16.1.2 key 0 123456789
switch(config)# exit
switch# show ip lisp
switch# show ipv6 lisp

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip lisp etr accept-map-request verify
switch(config)# ipv6 lisp etr accept-map-request verify
switch(config)# ip lisp etr map-cache-ttl 720
switch(config)# ipv6 lisp etr map-cache-ttl 720
switch(config)# ip lisp map-cache-limit 2000
switch(config)# ipv6 lisp map-cache-limit 2000
switch(config)# ip lisp map-request-source 172.16.1.1
switch(config)# ipv6 lisp map-request-source 2001:db8:0a::1
switch(config)# ip lisp path-mtu-discovery min 1200
switch(config)# ipv6 lisp path-mtu-discovery min 1200
switch(config)# lisp loc-reach-algorithm rloc-probing
switch(config)# exit
switch# show ip lisp
switch# show ipv6 lisp

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip lisp alt-vrf lisp
switch(config)# ipv6 lisp alt-vrf lisp
switch(config)# exit
switch# show ip lisp
switch# show ipv6 lisp

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip lisp map-resolver
switch(config)# ipv6 lisp map-resolver
switch(config)# exit
switch# show ip lisp
switch# show ipv6 lisp

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip lisp map-server
switch(config)# ipv6 lisp map-server
switch(config)# lisp site Customer1
switch(config-lisp-site)#
switch(config-lisp-site)# description LISP Site Customer1
switch(config-lisp-site)# authentication-key 0 123456789
switch(config-lisp-site)# eid-prefix 192.168.1.0/24 route-tag 12345
switch(config-lisp-site)# eid-prefix 2001:db8:aa::/48 route-tag 12345
switch(config-lisp-site)# end
switch# show ip lisp
switch# show ipv6 lisp

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# lisp site Customer1
switch(config-lisp-site)#
switch(config-lisp-site)# allowed-locators 172.16.8.1 2001:db8:aa::1
switch(config-lisp-site)# end
switch# show ip lisp
switch# show ipv6 lisp

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip lisp proxy-itr 172.16.8.1
switch(config)# ipv6 lisp proxy-itr 2001:db8:aa::1
switch(config)# exit
switch# show ip lisp
switch# show ipv6 lisp

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip lisp proxy-etr
switch(config)# ipv6 lisp proxy-etr
switch(config)# exit
switch# show ip lisp
switch# show ipv6 lisp

Configuring LISP ESM Multihop Mobility
switch(config)# ip lisp database-mapping 192.168.0.0/16 10.0.1.2 priority 1 weight 5
switch(config)#

LISP Instance-ID Support
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# vrf context vrf1
switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp database-mapping 192.168.1.0/24 10.0.0.2 priority 1 weight 100
switch(config-vrf)# ipv6 lisp database-mapping 2001:db8:b:a::/64 10.0.0.2 priority 1 weight 100
switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp itr
switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp etr
switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp itr map-resolver 10.0.2.2
switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp etr map-server 10.0.2.2 key 0 Left-key
switch(config-vrf)# ipv6 lisp itr
switch(config-vrf)# ipv6 lisp etr
switch(config-vrf)# ipv6 lisp itr map-resolver 10.0.2.2
switch(config-vrf)# ipv6 lisp etr map-server 10.0.2.2 key 0 Left-key
switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp locator-vrf BLUE
switch(config-vrf)# ipv6 lisp locator-vrf default
switch(config-vrf)# exit
switch(config)# ip lisp itr
switch(config)# ip lisp etr
switch(config)# ipv6 lisp itr
switch(config)# ipv6 lisp etr
switch(config)# ip route 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0 10.0.0.1
switch(config)# ipv6 route ::/0 Null0
switch(config)# show running-config lisp
switch(config)# show ip lisp vrf TRANS
switch(config)# show ip lisp map-cache
switch(config)# show ipv6 lisp database vrf GOLD
switch(config)# show lisp site
switch(config)# show ip lisp map-cache vrf vrf1
switch(config)# clear ip lisp map-cache vrf vrf1

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# lisp site LEFT
switch(config-lisp-site)# authentication-key 0 Left-key
switch(config-lisp-site)# eid-prefix 192.168.1.0/24 instance-id 102
switch(config-lisp-site)# eid-prefix 2001:db8:a:b::/64 instance-id 102
switch(config-lisp-site)# exit
switch(config)# ip lisp map-resolver
switch(config)# ipv6 lisp map-resolver
switch(config)# ip lisp map-server
switch(config)# ipv6 lisp map-server
switch(config)# show running-config lisp
switch(config)# show ip lisp vrf TRANS
switch(config)# show ip lisp map-cache
switch(config)# show ipv6 lisp database vrf GOLD
switch(config)# show lisp site
switch(config)# show ip lisp map-cache vrf vrf1
switch(config)# clear ip lisp map-cache vrf vrf1

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# lisp site TRANS
switch(config-lisp-site)# authentication-key 0 Left-key
switch(config-lisp-site)# eid-prefix 10.1.0.0/16 instance-id 1 accept-more-specifics
switch(config-lisp-site)# exit
switch(config)# ip lisp map-resolver
switch(config)# ip lisp map-server
switch(config)# vrf context vrf1
switch(config-vrf)# database-mapping 10.1.1.0/24 172.16.1.2 priority 1 weight 100
switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp etr map-server 172.16.1.2 key 0 TRANS-key
switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp itr map-resolver 172.16.1.2
switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp itr map-resolver 172.16.1.6
switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp itr
switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp etr
switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp locator-vrf BLUE
switch(config-vrf)# ipv6 lisp locator-vrf default
switch(config-vrf)# exit
switch(config)# ip route 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0 172.16.1.1
switch(config)# show running-config lisp
switch(config)# show ip lisp vrf TRANS
switch(config)# show ip lisp map-cache
switch(config)# show ipv6 lisp database vrf GOLD
switch(config)# show lisp site
switch(config)# show ip lisp map-cache vrf vrf1
switch(config)# clear ip lisp map-cache vrf vrf1

Switch# configure terminal
Switch(config)# vrf context vrf1
Switch(config-vrf)# database-mapping 10.1.1.0/24 172.16.1.2 priority 1 weight 100
Switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp etr map-server 172.16.1.2 key 0 TRANS-key
Switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp etr map-server 172.16.1.6 key 0 TRANS-key
Switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp itr map-resolver 172.16.1.2
Switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp itr map-resolver 172.16.1.6
Switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp itr
Switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp etr
Switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp locator-vrf BLUE
Switch(config-vrf)# ipv6 lisp locator-vrf default
Switch(config-vrf)# exit
Switch(config)# ip route 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0 172.16.2.1
Switch(config)# show running-config lisp
Switch(config)# show ip lisp vrf TRANS
Switch(config)# show ip lisp map-cache
Switch(config)# show ipv6 lisp database vrf GOLD
Switch(config)# show lisp site
Switch(config)# show ip lisp map-cache vrf vrf1
Switch(config)# clear ip lisp map-cache vrf vrf1

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# vrf context vrf1
switch(config-vrf)# lisp instance-id 101
switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp database-mapping 192.168.1.0/24 10.0.0.2 priority 1 weight 1
switch(config-vrf)# exit
switch(config)# ip lisp itr map-resolver 10.0.2.2
switch(config)# ip lisp etr map-server 10.0.2.2 key 0 PURPLE-key
switch(config)# ip lisp itr
switch(config)# ip lisp etr
switch(config)# ipv6 lisp itr map-resolver 10.0.2.2
switch(config)# ipv6 lisp etr map-server 10.0.2.2 key 0 PURPLE-key
switch(config)# ipv6 itr
switch(config)# ipv6 etr
switch(config)# ip route vrf BLUE 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0 10.0.0.1
switch(config)# ipv6 route vrf BLUE ::/0 Null0
switch(config)# show running-config lisp
switch(config)# show ip lisp vrf TRANS
switch(config)# show ip lisp map-cache
switch(config)# show ipv6 lisp database vrf GOLD
switch(config)# show lisp site
switch(config)# show ip lisp map-cache vrf vrf1
switch(config)# clear ip lisp map-cache vrf vrf1

Switch# configure terminal
Switch(config)# lisp site PURPLE
Switch(config-lisp-site)# authentication-key 0 Purple-key
Switch(config-lisp-site)# eid-prefix 192.168.1.0/24 instance-id 101
Switch(config-lisp-site)# eid-prefix 2001:db8:a:b::/64 instance-id 101
Switch(config-lisp-site)# exit
Switch(config)# ip lisp map-resolver
Switch(config)# ip lisp map-server
Switch(config)# ipv6 lisp map-resolver
Switch(config)# ipv6 lisp map-server
Switch(config)# ip route vrf BLUE 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0 10.0.2.1
Switch(config)# show running-config lisp
Switch(config)# show ip lisp vrf TRANS
Switch(config)# show ip lisp map-cache
Switch(config)# show ipv6 lisp database vrf GOLD
Switch(config)# show lisp site
Switch(config)# show ip lisp map-cache vrf vrf1
Switch(config)# clear ip lisp map-cache vrf vrf1

Configuring LISP Delegate Database Tree (DDT)
Switch# configure terminal
Switch(config)# lisp ddt
Switch(config)# lisp ddt root 10.1.1.1
Switch(config)# lisp ddt map-server-peer 10.1.1.1 eid-prefix 2001:db8:eeee::/48
Switch(config)# lisp ddt authoritative-prefix eid-prefix 172.16.0.0/16
Switch(config)# exit
Switch# show lisp ddt vrf vrf-1
Switch# show lisp ddt queue 10.1.1.1
Switch# show lisp ddt referral-cache 10.1.1.1
Switch# end

Configuring LISP Multicast
Device# configure terminal
Device(config)# vrf context management
Device(config-vrf)# ip pim rp-address 10.0.0.1 group-list 224.0.0.0/8
Device(config-vrf)# ip pim ssm range 232.0.0.0/8
Device(config-vrf)# ip lisp itr-etr
Device(config-vrf)# ip lisp database-mapping 10.0.0.0/24 10.0.0.1 priority 1 weight 100
Device(config-vrf)# lisp instance-id 1
Device(config-vrf)# ip lisp locator-vrf default
Device(config-vrf)# ip lisp itr map-resolver 10.0.0.2
Device(config-vrf)# ip lisp etr map-server 10.0.0.2 key 3 5b0f2bd760fe4ce3
Device(config-vrf)# ip lisp multicast
Device(config-vrf)# exit
Device# show ip mroute detail
Router# show ip pim lisp encap
Router# show forwarding distribution multicast route group 226.1.1.1

LISP Support for Disjointed RLOC Domains
Configuring LISP Extranets
MS# configure terminalMS(config)# router lispMS(config-router-lisp)# service ipv4MS(config-router-li
MS# configure terminalMS(config)# site SITE_ALL_v4MS(config-lisp-site)# authentication-key ciscoMS(c
MS(config-router-lisp)# extranet ext_policy_1MS(config-router-lisp-extranet)# eid-record-provider in

!xTR3 Configurations!switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# vrf context VRF3
switch(config-vrf)# i
!xTR1 Configurations!switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# vrf context VRF1
switch(config-vrf)# i

switch# show ip lisp map-cache vrf VRF3LISP IP Mapping Cache for VRF VRF3" (iid 300), 2 entries10.1.
switch# show ip route vrf VRF3IP Route Table for VRF VRF310.1.1.0/24, ubest/mbest: 1/0 time *via
switch# show ip lisp map-cache vrf VRF1LISP IP Mapping Cache for VRF VRF1" (iid 100), 1 entries10.3.
switch# show ip route vrf VRF1IP Route Table for VRF VRF110.3.0.0/16, ubest/mbest: 1/0 time *via
switch# show ip lisp map-cache vrf VRF2LISP IP Mapping Cache for VRF VRF2" (iid 200), 1 entries10.3.
switch# show ip route vrf VRF2IP Route Table for VRF VRF210.3.0.0/16, ubest/mbest: 1/0 time *via

!xTR3 Configurations!switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# vrf context VRF3
switch(config-vrf)# i

switch# show ip lisp database vrf VRF3LISP ETR IP Mapping Database for VRF VRF3" (iid 300), global L
switch# show ip lisp database vrf VRF4LISP ETR IP Mapping Database for VRF VRF4" (iid 400), global L
switch# show ip route vrf VRF3IP Route Table for VRF VRF310.3.0.0/16, ubest/mbest: 1/0 time, attache
switch# show ip route vrf VRF4IP Route Table for VRF VRF410.3.0.0/16, ubest/mbest: 1/0 time *via

Redistribution of RIB Routes into LISP
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# vrf context VRF1
switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp etr
switch(config-vrf)# lisp instance-id 100
switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp locator-vrf default
switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp etr map-server 10.10.10.10 key 3 1c27564ab12121212
switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp route-import database ospf 100 route-map RM_OSPF_to_LISP locator-set RLO

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# vrf context VRF1
switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp itr
switch(config-vrf)# lisp instance-id 100
switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp locator-vrf default
switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp itr map-resolver 10.10.10.2
switch(config-vrf)# ip lisp route-import map-cache bgp 65536 route-map RM_BGP_to_LISP

Configuration Limits for LISP
Preface
New and Changed Information
Overview
Configuring Basic OTV Features
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# feature otv
switch(config)# show feature | include otv
switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface overlay 1
switch(config-if-overlay)# description site 4
switch(config-if-overlay)# show otv overlay 1
switch(config-if-overlay)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface overlay 1
switch(config-if-overlay)# otv control-group 239.1.1.1
switch(config-if-overlay)# otv data-group 232.1.1.0/28
switch(config-if-overlay)# show otv data-group
switch(config-if-overlay)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface overlay 1
switch(config-if-overlay)# otv join-interface ethernet 2/1
switch(config-if-overlay)# show otv overlay 1
switch(config-if-overlay)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface overlay 1
switch(config-if-overlay)# otv extend-vlan 2,5-34
switch(config-if-overlay)# otv extend-vlan add 3
switch(config-if-overlay)# show otv vlan 2
switch(config-if-overlay)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# otv site-vlan 10
switch(config)# otv site-identifier 0018.g957.6rk0
switch(config)# show otv site
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

edge-device-1(config)# interface overlay1edge-device-1(config-if-overlay)# shutdown
edge-device-1(config)# otv site-identifier 0018.g957.6rk0
edge-device-1(config)# switchback
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# copp profile strict
switch(config)# switchto vdc edge-device-1edge-device-1# configure terminaledge-device-1(config)#
edge-device-1(config)# interface overlay1edge-device-1(config-if-overlay)# no shutdown
edge-device-2(config)# interface overlay1edge-device-2(config-if-overlay)# shutdown

Configuring Advanced OTV Features
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface overlay 1
switch(config-if-overlay)# otv isis authentication-check
switch(config-if-overlay)# otv isis authentication-type md5
switch(config-if-overlay)# otv isis authentication keychain OTVKeys
switch(config-if-overlay)# show otv overlay 1
switch(config-if-overlay)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# otv-isis default
switch(config-router)#
switch(config-router)# vpn overlay 2
switch(config-router-vrf)#
switch(config-router-vrf)# authentication-check
switch(config-router-vrf)# authentication-type md5
switch(config-router-vrf)# authentication keychain OTVKeys
switch(config-router-vrf)# show otv isis hostname vpn Marketing
switch(config-router-vrf)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface overlay 1
switch(config-if-overlay)# otv adjacency-server unicast-only
switch(config-if-overlay)# otv use-adjacency-server 192.0.2.1 unicast-only
switch(config-if-overlay)# show otv adjacency overlay 1
switch(config-if-overlay)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface overlay 1
switch(config-if-overlay)# otv arp-nd timeout 70
switch(config-if-overlay)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface overlay 1
switch(config-if-overlay)# no otv suppress-arp-nd
switch(config-if-overlay)# show otv arp-nd-cache
switch(config-if-overlay)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# otv flood mac 0000.ffaa.0000 vlan 328
switch(config)# show otv mroute vlan 328 startup
switch(config)# show otv route vlan 328
switch(config)# show forwarding distribution otv multicast route vlan 328
switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface overlay 1
switch(config-if-overlay)# otv vlan mapping 1-5 to 7-11
switch(config-if-overlay)# show otv vlan-mapping
switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface overlay 1
switch(config-if-overlay)# otv broadcast-group 224.1.1.10
switch(config-if-overlay)# show otv
switch(config-if-overlay)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# feature interface-vlan
switch(config)# interface vlan 2500
switch(config-if)# no ip redirects
switch(config-if)# ip address 172.1.2.1 255.255.255.0
switch(config-if)# no shutdown

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# otv-isis default
switch(config-router)#
switch(config-router)# track-adjacency-nexthop
switch(config-router)# exit
switch(config)# otv site-vlan 10
switch(config-site-vlan)#
switch(config-site-vlan)# otv isis bfd
switch(config-site-vlan)# show otv isis track-adjacency-nexthop
switch(config-site-vlan)# show bfd neighbors
switch(config-site-vlan)# show otv isis site
switch(config-site-vlan)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# otv-isis default
switch(config-router)#
switch(config-router)# vpn Marketing
switch(config-router-vrf)#
switch(config-router-vrf)# redistribute filter route-map otvFilter
switch(config-router-vrf)# show otv isis redistribute route vpn Marketing
switch(config-router-vrf)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# otv site-vlan 10
switch(config)# show otv site
switch(config)# show otv vlan authoritative detail

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface overlay 1
switch(config-if-overlay)# otv isis csnp-interval 100
switch(config-if-overlay)# otv isis hello-interval 30
switch(config-if-overlay)# otv isis hello-multiplier 30
switch(config-if-overlay)# otv isis hello-padding
switch(config-if-overlay)# otv isis lsp-interval 30
switch(config-if-overlay)# otv isis metric 30
switch(config-if-overlay)# otv isis lsp-interval 30
switch(config-if-overlay)# show otv isis interface overlay 2
switch(config-if-overlay)# copy running-config startup-config

Configuring DNS
Device> enable
Device# configure terminal
Device(config)# ip host cisco-rtp 192.168.0.148
Device(config)# ip host test mx 1 mx_record
Device(con
Device(config)# ip domain name cisco.com
Device(config)# ip domain list cisco1.com
Device(config)# ip name-server 172.16.1.111 172.16.1.2
Device(config)# ip domain lookup

Device> enable
Device# configure terminal
Device(config)# ip domain timeout 17
Device(config)# ip domain retry 10
Device(config)# ip domain round-robin

Device> enable
Device# configure terminal
Device(config)# no ip domain lookup nsap

Device> enable
Device# ping cisco-rtp
Device# show hosts
Device# debug ip domain

Device> enable
Device# configure terminal
Device(config)# ip dns view vrf vpn101 user3
Device(cfg-dns-view)# dns trust name
Device(cfg-dns-view)# domain lookup
Device(cfg-dns-view)# domain name example.com
Device(cfg-dns-view)# domain list example1.com
Device(cfg-dns-view)# domain name-server 192.168.2.124
Device(cfg-dns-view)# domain name-server interface FastEthernet0/1
Device(cfg-dns-view)# domain multicast www.example8.com
Device(cfg-dns-view)# dns forwarding
Device(cfg-dns-view)# dns forwarder 192.168.3.240
Device(cfg-dns-view)# dns forwarding source-interface FastEthernet0/0
Device(cfg-dns-view)# end

Device> enable
Device# show ip dns view vrf vpn101 user3
Device# show ip dns server vrf vpn101 user3

Device> enable
Device# configure terminal
Device(config)# ip dns view-list userlist5
Device(config)# ip dns name-list 10
Device(cfg-dns-view-list)# view vrf vpn101 user5 10
Device(cfg-dns-view-list-member)# restrict name-group 500
Device(cfg-dns-view-list-member)# restrict access-group 99
Device(cfg-dns-view-list-member)# exit
Device(cfg-dns-view-list)# end
Device# show ip dns view-list userlist5
Device# show ip dns name-list 5

Device> enable
Device# show ip dns view-list userlist5
Device# configure terminal
Device(config)# ip dns view-list userlist5
Device(cfg-dns-view-list)# view user4 15
Device(cfg-dns-view-list-member)# end
Device# show ip dns view-list userlist5

Device> enable
Device# show ip dns view-list userlist5
Device# configure terminal
Device(config)# ip dns view-list userlist5
Device(cfg-dns-view-list)# no view user1 10
Device(cfg-dns-view-list)# view user1 40
Device(cfg-dns-view-list-member)# end
Device# show ip dns view-list userlist5

Device> enable
Device# configure terminal
Device(config)# ip dns server view-group 500
Device(config)# exit
Device# show running-config

Device> enable
Device# configure terminal
Device(config)# interface ATM2/0
Device(config-if)# ip dns view-group userlist5
Device(config-if)# end
Device# show running-config

Device> enable
Device# configure terminal
Device(config)# ip dns view vrf vpn32 user3
Device(cfg-dns-view)# domain resolver source-interface fastethernet 0/0
Device(config-if)# end

switch(config-route-map)#match ip address access-list-name ACL1
switch(config-route-map)# matchipv6 address access-list-name ACLv6
switch(config-route-map)# match length 64 1500
switch(config-route-map)# match metric 10
switch(config-route-map)# match vlan 64

switch(config-route-map)#set ip next-hop 192.0.2.1
switch(config-route-map)#set ip default next-hop 192.0.2.2
switch(config-route-map)#set ipv6 next-hop 2001:0DB8::1
switch(config-route-map)#set ipv6 default next-hop 2001:0DB8::2
switch(config-route-map)#set ip precedence highv4
switch(config-route-map)#set ipv6 precedence highv6
switch(config-route-map)#set ipv6 precedence address prefix-list acl1
switch(config-route-map)#set interface null0
switch(config-route-map)#set vrf MainVRF

Configuring IGMP
switch# config t
switch(config)# interface ethernet 2/1
switch(config-if)# ip igmp version 3
switch(config-if)# ip igmp join-group 230.0.0.0
switch(config-if)# ip igmp static-oif 230.0.0.0
switch(config-if)# ip igmp startup-query-interval 25
switch(config-if)# ip igmp startup-query-count 3
switch(config-if)# ip igmp robustness-variable 3
switch(config-if)# ip igmp querier-timeout 300
switch(config-if)# ip igmp query-timeout 300
switch(config-if)# ip igmp query-max-response-time 15
switch(config-if)# ip igmp query-interval 100
switch(config-if)# ip igmp last-member-query-response-time 3
switch(config-if)# ip igmp last-member-query-count 3
switch(config-if)# ip igmp group-timeout 300
switch(config-if)# ip igmp report-link-local-groups
switch(config-if)# ip igmp report-policy my_report_policy
switch(config-if)# ip igmp access-group my_access_policy
switch(config-if)# ip igmp immediate-leave

switch(config-if)# ip igmp join-group 230.0.0.0

Configuring PIM and PIM6
interface loopback0 ip address 192.168.1.1/32 ip pim sparse-modeip pim bsr bsr-candidate loopback0
interface loopback0 ip address 192.168.2.1/32 ip pim sparse-modeip pim bsr bsr-candidate loopback0
show ip pim rp PIM RP Status Information for VRF "default" BSR: 192.168.1.1*, next Bootstrap message
show ip pim rp PIM RP Status Information for VRF "default" BSR: 192.168.1.1, uptime: 00:04:27, expir

interface loopback0 ip address 192.168.1.1/32 ip pim sparse-modeip pim bsr bsr-candidate loopback0
interface loopback0 ip address 192.168.2.1/32 ip pim sparse-modeip pim bsr bsr-candidate loopback0
show ip pim rpPIM RP Status Information for VRF "default" BSR: 192.168.2.1, uptime: 01:45:20, expire
show ip pim rpPIM RP Status Information for VRF "default" BSR: 192.168.2.1*, next Bootstrap message

interface loopback0 ip address 192.168.1.1/32 ip pim sparse-modeip pim auto-rp mapping-agent loopb
interface loopback0 ip address 192.168.2.1/32 ip pim sparse-modeip pim auto-rp mapping-agent loopb
show ip pim rpPIM RP Status Information for VRF "default" BSR disabled Auto-RP RPA: 192.168.2.1, nex
show ip pim rpPIM RP Status Information for VRF "default" BSR disabled Auto-RP RPA: 192.168.2.1*, ne

interface loopback0 ip address 192.168.1.1/32 ip pim sparse-modeip pim bsr bsr-candidate loopback0
interface loopback0 ip address 192.168.2.1/32 ip pim sparse-modeip pim bsr bsr-candidate loopback0
show ip pim group 224.1.1.0 PIM Group-Range Configuration for VRF "default" Group-range Mode
show ip pim group 224.1.1.0 PIM Group-Range Configuration for VRF "default" Group-range Mode

interface loopback0 ip address 192.168.1.1/32 ip pim sparse-modeip pim bsr bsr-candidate loopback0
interface loopback0 ip address 192.168.2.1/32 ip pim sparse-modeip pim bsr bsr-candidate loopback0
show ip pim rp PIM RP Status Information for VRF "default" BSR: 192.168.2.1, uptime: 00:09:14, expi
show ip pim rp PIM RP Status Information for VRF "default" BSR: 192.168.2.1*, next Bootstrap messag

interface loopback0 ip address 192.168.1.1/32 ip pim sparse-modeip pim bsr bsr-candidate loopback0
interface loopback0 ip address 192.168.2.1/32 ip pim sparse-modeip pim bsr bsr-candidate loopback0
show ip pim group 224.1.1.0 PIM Group-Range Configuration for VRF "default" Group-range Mode
show ip pim group 224.1.1.0 PIM Group-Range Configuration for VRF "default" Group-range Mode

interface loopback0 ip address 192.168.1.1/32 ip pim sparse-modeip pim bsr bsr-candidate loopback0
interface loopback0 ip address 192.168.2.1/32 ip pim sparse-modeip pim rp-address 192.168.2.1 grou
show ip pim group 224.1.1.0 PIM Group-Range Configuration for VRF "default" Group-range Mode
show ip pim group 224.1.1.0 PIM Group-Range Configuration for VRF "default" Group-range Mode

interface loopback0 ip address 192.168.1.1/32 ip pim sparse-modeip pim rp-address 192.168.1.1 grou
interface loopback0 ip address 192.168.2.1/32 ip pim sparse-modeip pim bsr bsr-candidate loopback0
show ip pim group 224.1.1.0 PIM Group-Range Configuration for VRF "default"Group-range Mode
show ip pim group 224.1.1.0 PIM Group-Range Configuration for VRF "default"Group-range Mode

interface loopback0 ip address 192.168.1.1/32 ip pim sparse-modeip pim bsr bsr-candidate loopback0
interface loopback0 ip address 192.168.2.1/32 ip pim sparse-modeip pim rp-address 192.168.2.1 grou
show ip pim rp PIM RP Status Information for VRF "default" BSR: 192.168.1.1*, next Bootstrap messag
show ip pim rp PIM RP Status Information for VRF "default" BSR: 192.168.1.1, uptime: 00:29:47, expi

switch# config t
switch(config)# feature pim
switch(config)# feature pim6
switch(config)# show running-configuration pim
switch(config)# show running-configuration pim6
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# ip pim auto-rp listen
switch(config)# ip pim bsr forward
switch(config)# show ip pim rp
switch(config)# ip pim bidir-rp-limit 4
switch(config)# ip pim register-rate-limit 1000
switch(config)# ip routing multicast holddown 100
switch(config)# show running-configuration pim
switch(config)# interface ethernet 2/1
switch(config-if)# ip pim sparse-mode
switch(config-if)# ip pim dr-priority 192
switch(config-if)# ip pim hello-authentication ah-md5 my_key
switch(config-if)# ip pim hello-interval 25000
switch(config-if)# ip pim border
switch(config-if)# ip pim neighbor-policy my_neighbor_policy
switch(config-if)# show ip pim interface
switch(config-if)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# ip pim auto-rp listen
switch(config)# show ipv6 pim rp
switch(config)# ipv6 pim bidir-rp-limit 4
switch(config)# ipv6 pim register-rate-limit 1000
switch(config)# ipv6 routing multicast holddown 100
switch(config)# show running-configuration pim6
switch(config)# interface ethernet 2/1
switch(config-if)# ipv6 pim sparse-mode
switch(config-if)# ipv6 pim dr-priority 192
switch(config-if)# ipv6 pim hello-interval 25000
switch(config-if)# ipv6 pim border
switch(config-if)# ip pim border
switch(config-if)# show ipv6 pim interface
switch(config-if)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface Ethernet 0/0
switch(config-if)# ip pim sparse-mode
switch(config-if)# exit
switch# show ip igmp interface

switch# config t
switch(config)# ip pim rp-address 192.0.2.33 group-list 224.0.0.0/9
switch(config)# ip pim rp-address 192.0.2.34 group-list 224.128.0.0/9 bidir
switch(config)# show ip pim group-range
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# ipv6 pim rp-address 2001:0db8:0:abcd::1 group-list ff1e:abcd:def1::0/24
switch(config)# ipv6 pim rp-address 2001:0db8:0:abcd::2 group-list ff1e:abcd:def2::0/96 bidir
switch(config)# show ipv6 pim group-range
switch(config)# show ipv6 pim group-range

switch# config t
switch(config)# ip pim bsr listen forward
switch(config)# ip pim bsr-candidate ethernet 2/1 hash-len 24
switch(config)# ip pim sparse-mode
switch(config)# ip pim rp-candidate ethernet 2/1 group-list 239.0.0.0/24
switch(config)# ip pim rp-candidate ethernet 2/1 group-list 239.0.0.0/24 bidir
switch(config)# show ip pim group-range
switch(config)# ipv6 routing multicast holddown 100

switch# config t
switch(config)# ipv6 pim bsr-candidate ethernet 2/1 hash-len 24 priority 192
switch(config)# ipv6 pim rp-candidate ethernet 2/1 group-list ff1e:abcd:def1::0/24
switch(config)# ipv6 pim rp-candidate ethernet 2/1 group-list ff1e:abcd:def2::0/24 bidir
switch(config)# show ipv6 pim group-range
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
s
switch(config)# ip pim auto-rp mapping-agent ethernet 2/1
switch(config)# ip pim auto-rp rp-candidate ethernet 2/1 group-list 239.0.0.0/24
switch(config)# ip pim auto-rp rp-candidate ethernet 2/1 group-list 239.0.0.0/24 bidir
switch(config)# ip pim sparse-mode
switch(config)# show ip pim group-range
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# interface loopback 0
switch(config-if)# ip address 192.0.2.3/32
switch(config)# exit
switch(config)# ip pim anycast-rp 192.0.2.3 192.0.2.31
switch(config)# show ip pim group-range
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# interface loopback 0
switch(config-if)# ipv6 address 2001:0db8:0:abcd::3/32
switch(config)# exit
switch(config)# ipv6 pim anycast-rp 2001:0db8:0:abcd::3 2001:0db8:0:abcd::31
switch(config)# show ipv6 pim group-range
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# ip pim use-shared-tree-only group-list my_group_policy
switch(config)# show ip pim group-range
switch(config-if)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# ipv6 pim use-shared-tree-only group-list my_group_policy
switch(config)# show ipv6 pim group-range
switch(config-if)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# ip pim ssm range 239.128.1.0/24
switch(config)# no ip pim ssm range none
switch(config)# show ip pim group-range
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# ipv6 pim ssm range FF30::0/32
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# ip mroute 192.0.2.33/1 224.0.0.0/1
switch(config)# show ip static-route multicast

switch# config t
switch(config)# ip multicast multipath none
switch(config)# clear ip mroute *

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip multicast multipath s-g-hash next-hop-based
switch(config)# end
switch# show ip rpf 10.1.1.2
switch# show ip route 10.1.1.2

switch# config t
switch(config)# route-map ASM_only permit 10
switch(config)# route-map Bidir_only permit 10
switch(config-route-map)# match ip multicast group 224.0.0.0/4 rp 0.0.0.0/0 rp-type ASM
switch(config-route-map)# match ip multicast group 224.0.0.0/4 rp 0.0.0.0/0 rp-type Bdir
switch(config-route-map)# show route-map
switch(config-route-map)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# ip pim flush-routes
switch(config)# show running-configuration pim

Configuring MSDP
switch# config t
switch# feature msdp
switch# show running-configuration | grep feature
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# ip msdp peer 192.168.1.10 connect-source ethernet 2/1 remote-as 8
switch# show ip msdp summary
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# ip msdp description 192.168.1.10 peer in Engineering network
switch(config)# ip msdp shutdown 192.168.1.10
switch(config)# ip msdp password 192.168.1.10 my_md5_password
switch(config)# ip msdp sa-policy 192.168.1.10 my_incoming_sa_policy in
switch(config)# ip msdp sa-policy 192.168.1.10 my_outgoing_sa_policy out
switch(config)# ip msdp sa-limit 192.168.1.10 5000

switch(config-itd)# device-group dg1
switch(config-itd)# virtual ip 172.16.1.10 255.255.255.255

switch(config)# itd device-group dg1

switch(config-device-group)# node ip 192.168.1.10
switch(config-device-group)# node ip 192.168.1.20
switch# exit
switch(config)# itd device-group dg_server1
switch(config-device-group)# probe icmp
switch(config-device-group)# node ip 192.168.1.30
switch(config-device-group)# node ip 192.168.2.40
switch# exit
switch(config)# itd device-group dg_server2
switch(config-device-group)# probe icmp
switch(config-device-group)# node ip 192.168.1.50
switch(config-device-group)# node ip 192.168.1.60
switch# exit

switch# configure terminal
switch (config) # itd multi-dg
switch(config-itd)# device-group dg1
switch(config-itd)# virtual ip 172.16.1.10 255.255.255.255 tcp 23 device-group dg1_servers
switch(config-itd)# virtual ip 172.16.1.20 255.255.255.255 tcp 23 device-group dg2_servers
switch(config-itd)# ingress interface ethernet 3/1
switch(config-itd)# no shutdown

Configuring ACI WAN Interconnect

route-target import $include_client_import_ipv4_bgpRT_1 route-target export $include_client_exp

switch(config)# no fcdomain optimize fast-restart vsan 1

switch(config)# no fcdomain priority 12 vsan 1

switch(config)# no fcsp dhchap dhgroup [0|1|2|3|4]

switch(config-ivr-zone)# attribute qos priority medium
switch(config-ivr-zone)# show ivr pending-diff
switch(config-ivr-zone)# show ivr zone
switch(config-ivr-zone)# ivr commit

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ivr zone name sample_vsan2-3
switch(config-ivr-zone)#
switch(config-ivr-zone)# attribute read-only
switch(config-ivr-zone)# show ivr pending-diff
switch(config-ivr-zone)# show ivr zone
switch(config-ivr-zone)# ivr commit

IVR Topology
switch(config)# ivr vsan-topology database
switch(config-ivr-topology-db)#
switch(config-ivr-topology-db)# autonomous-fabric-id 1 switch 20:00:00:05:30:01:1b:b8 vsan-ranges 1-
switch(config)# ivr vsan-topology activate
switch(config)# show ivr vsan-topology

switch# ivr copy active-topology user-configured-topology

switch(config)# no ivr vsan-topology database

switch# ivr copy auto-topology user-configured-topology
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ivr vsan-topology activate

Autonomous Fabric IDs
switch(config)# autonomous-fabric-id database
switch(config-afid-db)#
switch(config-afid-db)# switch-wwn 20:00:00:0c:91:90:3e:80 default-autonomous-fabric-id 5

switch(config)# autonomous-fabric-id database
switch(config-afid-db)#
switch(config-afid-db)# switch-wwn 20:00:00:0c:91:90:3e:80 autonomous-fabric-id 10 vsan-ranges 1,2,5

Service Groups
switch(config)# ivr service-group name IVR-SG1
switch(config-ivr-sg)#
switch(config-ivr-sg)# autonomous-fabric-id 10 vsan-ranges 1,2,6-10
switch(config-ivr-sg)# exit
switch(config)# ivr service-group activate

Persistent FCIDs
switch(config)# ivr fcdomain database autonomous-fabric-num 21 vsan 22
switch(config-fcdomain)#
switch(config-fcdomain)# native-autonomous-fabric-num 20 native-vsan 11 domain 12
switch(config-fcdom
switch(config-fcdomain-db)# pwwn 11:22:33:44:55:66:77:88 fcid 0x114466
switch(config-fcdomain-db)# device-alias SampleName fcid 0x123456

Virtual Domains
switch(config)# ivr virtual-fcdomain-add vsan-ranges 1-4093
switch(config)# ivr commit

Overview
Service-Level High Availability

System-Level High Availability

Configuring FIPS

switch(config)# exit

switch(config)# exit

switch# configure terminal

switch(config)# exit

switch(config-ldap)#

switch(config-ldap)# authentication compare password-attribute TyuL8r

switch(config-ldap)# enable Cert-DN-match
switch(config-ldap)# use-vrf vrf1
switch(config-ldap)# exit

switch(config)# exit

switch(config)# exit

switch(config)# exit
switch# show ldap-server
switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch(config)# exit
switch# show ldap-server
switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch(config-ldap-search-map)# exit

DeviceA(config)# ip domain-name example.com

switch(config)# exit

switch(config-trustpoint)#
switch(config-trustpoint)# revocation-check none
switch(config-trustpoint)# exit

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# crypto ca enroll admin-caCreate the certificate request .. Create a challenge passwo
switch(config-trustpoint)# exit

switch# configure terminal

switch(config)# exit
switch# show crypto ca certificates
switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch(config)# exit

switch# copy tftp:adminid.p12 bootflash:adminid.p12

switch(config)# crypto ca import admin-ca pkcs12 bootflash:adminid.p12 nbv123
switch(config)# exit

switch(config)# exit

switch(config)# crypto ca trustpoint admin-ca
switch(config-trustpoint)#

switch(config-trustpoint)# delete certificate
switch(config-trustpoint)# exit

switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# crypto key zeroize rsa MyKey
switch(config)# exit

switch# copy running-config startup-config

Device-1(config)# ip domain-name cisco.com
Device-1(config)# crypto ca trustpoint myCA

Device-1(config)# show c
Device-1(config)# crypto key generate rsa label myKey exportable modulus 1024
Device-1(config)# show
Device-1(config)# crypto ca trustpoint myCA
Device-1(config-trustpoint)# rsakeypair myKey
Device-1(con
Device-1(config)# crypto ca authenticate myCAinput (cut & paste) CA certificate (chain) in PEM forma
Device-1(config)# crypto ca enroll myCA Create the certificate request .. Create a challenge passwor
Device-1(config)# crypto ca import myCA certificateinput (cut & paste) certificate in PEM format:---

Device-1# copy tftp:apranaCA.crl bootflash:aparnaCA.crl
Device-1# configure terminal
