Managing User Accounts
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# password strength-check
switch(config)# exit
switch# show password strength-check
switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# show role
switch(config)# username NewUser password 4Ty18Rnt
switch(config)# exit
switch# show user-account
switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# role distribute
switch(config)# exit
switch# show role session status
switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# role name UserA
switch(config-role)#
switch(config-role)# rule 1 attribute-admin
switch(config-role)# rule 1 deny command clear users
switch(config-role)# rule 2 deny read-write
switch(config-role)# rule 3 permit read feature router-bgp
switch(config-role)# rule 4 deny read-write feature-group L3
switch(config-role)# rule 5 deny read-write oid 1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9
switch(config-role)# description This role does not allow users to use clear commands
switch(config-role)# exit
switch(config)# show role
switch(config)# show role pending
switch(config)# role commit
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# role feature-group name GroupA
switch(config-role-featuregrp)#
switch(config-role-featuregrp)# feature vdc
switch(config-role-featuregrp)# exit

switch(config)# show role pending
switch(config)# role commit
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# role name UserA
switch(config-role)#
switch(config-role)# interface policy deny
switch(config-role-interface)#
switch(config-role-interface)# permit interface ethernet 2/1-4
switch(config-role-interface)# exit
switch(config-role)#
switch(config-role)# show role
switch(config-role)# show role pending
switch(config-role)# role commit
switch(config-role)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# role name UserA
switch(config-role)#
switch(config-role)# vlan policy deny
switch(config-role-vlan)#

switch(config-role-vlan)# exit
switch(config-role)#
switch(config)# show role
switch(config-role)# show role pending
switch(config-role)# role commit
switch(config-role)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# role name UserA
switch(config-role)#
switch(config-role)# vrf policy deny
switch(config-role-vrf)#

switch(config-role-vrf)# exit
switch(config-role)#
switch(config-role)# show role
switch(config-role)# show role pending
switch(config-role)# role commit
switch(config-role)# copy running-config startup-config

switch(config-if)# nac enable
switch(config-if)# exit
switch(config)# show running-config interface
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# identity policy AccType1
switch(config-id-policy)#
switch(config-id-policy)# object-group maxaclx
switch(config-id-policy)# description "This policy prevents endpoint device without a PA"
switch(config-id-policy)# exit
switch(config)# show identity policy
switch(config)# identity profile eapoudp
switch(config-id-prof)#
switch(config-id-prof)# device authenticate ip-address 10.10.2.2 policy AccType1
switch(config-id-prof)# exit
switch(config)# show identity profile eapoudp
switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch(config)# eou allow clientless
switch(config)# exit
switch# show eou

switch(config)# exit

switch(config-if)# eou timeout retransmit 10
switch(config-if)# eou timeout revalidation 30000

switch(config-if)# eou default
switch(config)# exit

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip device tracking enable
switch(config)# ip device tracking probe count 4
switch(config)# radius-server host 10.10.1.1 test username User2 password G1r2D37&k idle-time 5
switch(config)# exit
switch# show ip device tracking all
switch# show radius-server 10.10.1.1
switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch# clear ip device tracking all
switch# clear ip device tracking interface ethernet 2/1
switch# clear ip device tracking ip-address 10.10.1.1
switch# clear ip device tracking mac-address 000c.30da.86f4
switch# show ip device tracking all

switch# eou initialize all
switch# eou initialize authentication static
switch# eou initialize interface ethernet 2/1
switch# eou initialize ip-address 10.10.1.1
switch# eou initialize mac-address 000c.30da.86f4
switch# eou initialize posturetoken Healthy
switch# show eou all

switch# eou revalidate all
switch# eou revalidate authentication static
switch# eou revalidate interface ethernet 2/1
switch# eou revalidate ip-address 10.10.1.1
switch# eou revalidate mac-address 000c.30da.86f4
switch# eou revalidate posturetoken Healthy
switch# show eou all

switch# clear eou all
switch# clear eou authentication static
switch# clear eou interface ethernet 2/1
switch# clear eou ip-address 10.10.1.1
switch# clear eou mac-address 000c.30da.86f4
switch# clear eou posturetoken Healthy
switch# show eou all

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# no feature eou
switch(config)# exit
switch# show feature
switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch(config-rbacl)#
switch(config-rbacl)# deny all
switch(config-rbacl)# permit icmp
switch(config-rbacl)# deny igmp
switch(config-rbacl)# permit ip
switch(config-rbacl)# deny tcp dst eq 100
switch(config-rbacl)# permit udp src eq 1312
switch(config-rbacl)# exit
switch(config)# cts role-based sgt 3 dgt 10 access-list MySGACL

Configuring MACsec Key Agreement
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# macsec non-standard eapol ethertype 0x8976
switch(config)# macsec policy test
switch(config-macsec-policy)# mka enable non-std-eapol ETYPE-ONLY
switch(config-macsec-policy)# exit
switch(config-if)# interface ethernet2/1
switch(config-if)# macsec keychain 1 policy etype-only
switch(config)# show macsec policy test
switch(config)# show macsec mka session

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# macsec non-standard eapol dmac-addr 11:11:22:22:33:33
switch(config)# macsec policy test
switch(config-macsec-policy)# mka enable non-std-eapol DMAC-ONLY
switch(config-macsec-policy)# exit
switch(config-if)# interface ethernet2/1
switch(config-if)# macsec keychain 1 policy DMAC-ONLY
switch(config)# show macsec policy test
switch(config)# show macsec mka session

Configuring IP ACLs
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip access-list acl-01
switch(config-acl)#
switch(config-acl)# fragments permit-all
switch(config-acl)# permit ip 192.168.2.0/24 any
switch(config-acl)# statistics per-entry
switch(config-acl)# show ip access-lists acl-01
switch(config-acl)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip access-list acl-01
switch(config-acl)#
switch(config-acl)# 100 permit ip 192.168.2.0/24 any
switch(config-acl)# fragments permit-all
switch(config-acl)# no 80
switch(config-acl)# statistics per-entry
switch(config-acl)# show ip access-lists acl-01
switch(config-acl)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# resequence access-list ip acl-01 100 10

switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# no ip access-list acl-01
switch(config)# show ip access-lists acl-01 summary
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch(config-if)# ip port access-group acl-l2-marketing-group in

switch(config-if)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# hardware access-list resource feature bank-mapping
switch# show hardware access-list input vlan feature-combo pacl_____________________________________

switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# hardware access-list compress module 2
switch(config)# interface port-channel 1
switch(config-if)# ip access-group test in compress
switch(config-if)# end
switch# show ip access-list test compress
switch# show hardware access-list compress
switch# show system internal access-list resource presearch-utilization
switch# show system internal access-list interface port-channel 1 input presearch-entries
switch# show system internal access-list interface port-channel 1 input statistics

switch(config-ipaddr-ogroup)# no host 10.99.32.6

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# time-range workday-daytime
switch(config-time-range)#
switch(config-time-range)# periodic monday 00:00:00 to friday 23:59:59
switch(config-time-range)# periodic weekdays 06:00:00 to 20:00:00
switch(config-time-range)# absolute start 1:00 15 march 2008
switch(config-time-range)# absolute end 23:59:59 31 december 2008
switch(config-time-range)# show time-range workday-daytime
switch(config-time-range)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# time-range workday-daytime
switch(config-time-range)#
switch(config-time-range)# periodic monday 00:00:00 to friday 23:59:59
switch(config-time-range)# 100 periodic weekdays 05:00:00 to 22:00:00
switch(config-time-range)# absolute start 1:00 15 march 2008
switch(config-time-range)# absolute end 23:59:59 31 december 2008
switch(config-time-range)# no 80

switch(config)# resequence time-range daily-workhours 100 10

Configuring a MAC ACL
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# mac access-list acl-mac-01
switch(config-mac-acl)#
switch(config-mac-acl)# permit 00c0.4f00.0000 0000.00ff.ffff any
switch(config-mac-acl)# statistics per-entry
switch(config-mac-acl)# show mac access-lists acl-mac-01
switch(config-mac-acl)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# mac access-list acl-mac-01
switch(config-mac-acl)#
switch(config-mac-acl)# 100 permit mac 00c0.4f00.00 0000.00ff.ffff any
switch(config-mac-acl)# no 80
switch(config-mac-acl)# statistics per-entry
switch(config-mac-acl)# show mac access-lists acl-mac-01
switch(config-mac-acl)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# resequence mac access-list acl-mac-01 100 10
switch(config)# show mac access-lists acl-mac-01
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# no mac access-list acl-mac-01
switch(config)# show mac access-lists acl-mac-01 summary
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface ethernet 2/1
switch(config)# interface port-channel 5
switch(config-if)# mac port access-group acl-01
switch(config-if)# show running-config aclmgr
switch(config-if)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface ethernet 2/1
switch(config)# interface port-channel 5
switch(config-if)# mac packet-classify
switch(config-if)# show running-config interface ethernet 2/1
switch(config-if)# show running-config interface port-channel 5
switch(config-if)# copy running-config startup-config

Configuring Port Security
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# feature port-security

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# fc-port-security activate vsan 30 no-auto-learn

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# fc-port-security activate vsan 212 force

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# no fc-no port-security auto-learn vsan 35
switch(config)# exit
switch# fc-port-security database copy vsan 35
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# fc-port-security activate vsan 35

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# fc-port-security auto-learn vsan 1

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# no fc-port-security auto-learn vsan 23

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# fc-port-security distribute
switch(config)# no fc-port-security distribute

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# fc-port-security commit vsan 100

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# fc-port-security abort vsan 35

Configuring DHCP
switch# config t
switch(config)# feature dhcp
switch(config)# show running-config dhcp
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# ip dhcp snooping
switch(config)# show running-config dhcp
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# ip dhcp snooping vlan 100,200,250-252

switch(config)# ip dhcp snooping verify mac-address

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ipv6 dhcp relay
switch(config)# show ipv6 dhcp relay
switch(config)# show running-config dhcp
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ipv6 dhcp relay option vpn
switch(config)# ipv6 dhcp relay option type cisco
switch(config)# show ipv6 dhcp relay
switch(config)# show running-config dhcp
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# interface ethernet 2/3
switch(config-if)# ipv6 dhcp relay address FF02:1::FF0E:8C6C
switch(config-if)# show running-config dhcp
switch(config-if)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ipv6 dhcp relay source-interface loopback 2
switch(config)# show ipv6 dhcp relay
switch(config)# show running-config dhcp
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# clear ip dhcp snooping binding
switch# clear ip dhcp snooping binding interface ethernet 1/4
switch# clear ip dhcp snooping binding interface port-channel 72
switch# clear ip dhcp snooping binding vlan 23 mac 0060.3aeb.54f0 ip 10.34.54.9 interface ethernet 2
switch# show ip dhcp snooping binding

Configuring DHCP Snooping
switch# config t
switch(config)# feature dhcp
switch(config)# show running-config dhcp
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# ip dhcp snooping
switch(config)# show running-config dhcp
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# ip dhcp snooping vlan 100,200,250-252
switch(config)# show running-config dhcp
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# ip dhcp snooping verify mac-address
switch(config)# show running-config dhcp
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# config t
switch(config)# ip dhcp snooping information option
switch(config)# show running-config dhcp
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch(config-if)# ip dhcp snooping trust

switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

Configuring IPv6 First-Hop Security
Device# configure terminal
Device(config)# ipv6 nd raguard policy policy1
Device(config-ra-guard)# device-role router
Device(config-ra-guard)# hop-limit minimum 3
Device(config-ra-guard)# managed-config-flag on
Device(config-ra-guard)# other-config-flag on
Device(config-ra-guard)# router-preference maximum high
Device(config-ra-guard)# trusted-port
Device(config-ra-guard)# exit

Device# configure terminal
Device(config)# interface fastethernet 3/13
Device(config-if)# ipv6 nd raguard attach-policy
Device(config-if)# exit
switch# show ipv6 nd raguard policy hostPolicy host configuration: device-role hostPolicy applied
Device# debug ipv6 snooping raguard

Device# configure terminal
Device(config)# ipv6 dhcp guard policy pol1
Device(config-dhcp-guard)# device-role server
Device(config-dhcp-guard)# preference min 0
Device(config-dhcp-guard)# preference max 255
Device(config-dhcp-guard)# trusted-port
Device(config-dhcp-guard)# exit
Device(config)# interface GigabitEthernet 0/2/0
Device(config-if)# switchport
Device(config-if)# ipv6 dhcp guard attach-policy pol1
Device(config-if)# exit
Device(config)# vlan configuration 1
Device(config-vlan-config)# ipv6 dhcp guard attach-policy pol1
Device(config-vlan-config)# exit
Device(config)# exit
Device# show ipv6 dhcp policy guard pol1

Device# configure terminal
Device(config)# ipv6 snooping policy policy1
Device(config-ipv6-snooping)# ipv6 snooping attach-policy policy1

Device# configure terminal
Device(config)# ipv6 neighbor binding vlan 100 interface Ethernet 0/0 reachable-lifetime 100
Device(config)# ipv6 neighbor binding max-entries 100
Device(config)# ipv6 neighbor binding logging
Device(config)# ipv6 neighbor binding retry-interval 8
Device(config)# exit
Device# show ipv6 neighbor binding

Device# show ipv6 snooping capture-policy interface ethernet 0/0
Device# show ipv6 snooping counter interface FastEthernet 4/12
Device# show ipv6 snooping features
Device# show ipv6 snooping policies
Device# debug ipv6 snooping

Configuring Dynamic ARP Inspection
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip arp inspection vlan 13
switch(config)# show ip arp inspection vlan 13
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface ethernet 2/1
switch(config-if)# ip arp inspection trust
switch(config-if)# show ip arp inspection interface ethernet 2/1
switch(config-if)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip arp inspection filter arp-acl-01 vlan 100
switch(config)# show ip arp inspection vlan 100
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip arp inspection validate src-mac dst-mac ip
switch(config)# show running-config dhcp
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip arp inspection log-buffer entries 64
switch(config)# show running-config dhcp
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip arp inspection vlan 100 dhcp-bindings permit
switch(config)# show running-config dhcp
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# arp access-list arp-acl-01
switch(config-arp-acl)#
switch(config-arp-acl)# permit ip 192.168.2.0 255.2555.255.0 mac 00C0.4F00.0000 ffff.ff00.0000
switch(config-arp-acl)# permit request ip 192.168.102.0 0.0.0.255 mac any
switch(config-arp-acl)# permit response ip host 192.168.202.32 any mac host 00C0.4FA9.BCF3 any
switch(config-arp-acl)# show arp access-lists arp-acl-01
switch(config-arp-acl)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# arp access-list arp-acl-01
switch(config-acl)#
switch(config-arp-acl)# 100 permit request ip 192.168.132.0 255.2555.255.0 mac any
switch(config-arp-acl)# no 80
switch(config-arp-acl)# show arp access-lists
switch(config-arp-acl)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# no arp access-list arp-acl-01
switch(config)# show arp access-lists
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# resequence arp access-list arp-acl-01 100 10
switch(config)# show arp access-lists arp-acl-01
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

Configuring IP Source Guard
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface ethernet 2/3
switch(config-if)# ip verify source dhcp-snooping vlan
switch(config-if)# show running-config dhcp
switch(config-if)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip source binding 10.5.22.17 001f.28bd.0013 vlan 100 interface ethernet 2/3
switch(config)# show ip dhcp snooping binding interface ethernet 2/3
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

Configuring Unicast RPF
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface ethernet 2/3
switch(config-if)# ip verify unicast source reachable-via any
switch(config-if)# ipv6 verify unicast source reachable-via any
switch(config-if)# exit
switch(config)# show ip interface ethernet 2/3
switch(config)# show running-config interface ethernet 2/3
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

Configuring Control Plane Policing
ip access-list copp-system-acl-hsrp permit udp any 224.0.0.0/24 eq 1985

class-map type control-plane copp-sample-class
control-planeservice-policy input copp-system-policy

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# policy-map type control-plane ClassMapA
switch(config-pmap)#
switch(config-pmap)# class ClassMapA
switch(config-pmap-c)#
switch(config-pmap-c)# police cir 52000
switch(config-pmap-c)# police cir 52000 bc 1000
switch(config-pmap-c)# police cir 52000 conform transmit exceed drop
switch(config-pmap-c)# police cir 52000 pir 78000 be 2000
switch(config-pmap-c)# set cos 1
switch(config-pmap-c)# set dscp 10
switch(config-pmap-c)# set precedence 2
switch(config-pmap-c)# exit
switch(config-pmap)#
switch(config-pmap)# exit
switch(config)# show policy-map type control-plane
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# control-plane
switch(config-cp)#
switch(config-cp)# service-policy input PolicyMapA
switch(config-cp)# exit
switch(config)# show running-config copp
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# control-plane
switch(config-cp)#
switch(config-cp)# scale-factor 1.10 module 1-2
switch(config-cp)# show running-config copp
switch(config-cp)# show policy-map interface control-plane
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch(config)# copp profile moderate
switch(config)# show copp status
switch(config)# show running-config copp

Configuring Rate Limits
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# hardware rate-limiter access-list-log 200
switch(config)# hardware rate-limiter copy 30000
switch(config)# hardware rate-limiter layer-2 mcast-snooping 20000
switch(config)# hardware rate-limiter layer-2 port-security 100000
switch(config)# hardware rate-limiter layer-2 storm-control 10000
switch(config)# hardware rate-limiter layer-2 vpc-low 10000
switch(config)# hardware rate-limiter layer-3 control 20000
switch(config)# hardware rate-limiter layer-3 glean 200
switch(config)# hardware rate-limiter layer-3 glean-fast 500
switch(config)# hardware rate-limiter layer-3 mtu 1000
switch(config)# hardware rate-limiter layer-3 multicast 20000
switch(config)# hardware rate-limiter layer-3 ttl 1000
switch(config)# hardware rate-limiter receive 40000
switch(config)# exit
switch# show hardware rate-limiter
switch# copy running-config startup-config

switch# show hardware rate-limiter layer-3 glean

switch# clear hardware rate-limiter

Configuring Audio Video Bridging
switch# show msrp port bandwidth Ethernet Capacity Assigned Available Reserved ----

Switch # show queuing interface ethernet 1/5 outputEgress Queuing for Ethernet1/5 [System]----------

Preface
New and Changed Information
Overview of IP Service Level Agreements
Configuring IP SLA UDP Jitter Operations
switch> enable
switch# configure terminal
Example: switch(config)# ip sla responder
Example: switch(config)# ip sla responder udp-echoipaddress 172.29.139.132 port 5000
switch(config)# exit

switch# enable
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip sla 10
switch(config-ip-sla)# udp-jitter 172.29.139.134 5000
switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# frequency 30
switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# exit
switch(config)# ip sla schedule 5 start-time now life forever
switch(config)# exit
switch# show ip sla configuration 10

Switch> enable
Switch# configure terminal
Switch(config)# ip sla 10
Switch(config-ip-sla)# udp-jitter 172.29.139.134 5000
Switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# history distributions-of-statistics-kept 5
Switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# history enhanced interval 900 buckets 100
Switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# frequency 30
Switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# history hours-of-statistics-kept 4
Switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# owner admin
Switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# request-data-size 64
Switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# history statistics-distribution-interval 10
Switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# tag TelnetPollServer1
Switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# threshold 10000
Switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# timeout 10000
Switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# tos 160
Switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# verify-data
Switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# vrf vpn-A
Switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# exit
Switch(config)# ip sla schedule 5 start-time now life forever
Switch(config)# exit
Switch# show ip sla configuration 10

Configuring IP SLA UDP Jitter Operations for VoIP
switch> enable
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip sla 10
switch(config-ip-sla)# udp-jitter 209.165.200.225 16384 codec g711alaw advantage-factor 10
switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# history enhanced interval 900 buckets 100
switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# frequency 30
switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# history hours-of-statistics-kept 4
switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# owner admin
switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# tag TelnetPollServer1
switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# threshold 10000
switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# timeout 10000
switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# tos 160
switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# verify-data
switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# vrf vpn-A
switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# exit
switch(config)# ip sla schedule 5 start-time now life forever
switch(config)# exit
switch# show ip sla configuration 10

Configuring IP SLAs UDP Echo Operations
switch> enable
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip sla responder
switch(config)# ip sla responder udp-echo ipaddress 172.29.139.132 port 5000
switch(config)# exit

switch> enable
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip sla 10
switch(config-ip-sla)# udp-echo 172.29.139.134 5000
switch(config-ip-sla-udp)# frequency 30
switch(config-ip-sla-udp)# end

switch> enable
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip sla 10
switch(config-ip-sla)# udp-echo 172.29.139.134 5000
switch(config-ip-sla-udp)# history buckets-kept 25
switch(config-ip-sla-udp)# data-pattern
switch(config-ip-sla-udp)# history distributionsof- statistics-kept 5
switch(config-ip-sla-udp)# history enhanced interval 900 buckets 100
switch(config-ip-sla-udp)# history filter failures
switch(config-ip-sla-udp)# frequency 30
switch(config-ip-sla-udp)# history hours-ofstatistics- kept 4
switch(config-ip-sla-udp)# history lives-kept 5
switch(config-ip-sla-udp)# owner admin
switch(config-ip-sla-udp)# request-data-size 64
switch(config-ip-sla-udp)# history statistics distribution- interval 10
switch(config-ip-sla-udp)# tag TelnetPollServer1
switch(config-ip-sla-udp)# threshold 10000
switch(config-ip-sla-udp)# timeout 10000
switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# tos 160
switch(config-ip-sla-udp)# verify-data
switch(config-ip-sla-udp)# exit

switch> enable
switch# configure terminal
ip sla schedule operation-number [life {forever | seconds}] [starttime {hh : mm[: ss] [month day | d
switch(config)# ip sla group schedule 1 3,4,6-9
switch(config)# exit
switch# show ip sla group schedule
switch# show ip sla configuration

Configuring IP SLAs TCP Connect Operations
switch> enable
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip sla responder
switch(config)# ip sla responder tcp-connect ipaddress 172.29.139.132 port 5000
switch(config)# exit

switch> enable
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip sla 10
switch(config-ip-sla)# tcp-connect 172.29.139.132 5000
switch(config-ip-sla-tcp)# frequency 60
switch(config-ip-sla-tcp)# exit
switch(config)# ip sla schedule 10 start-time now life forever
switch(config)# exit

switch> enable
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip sla 10
switch(config-ip-sla)# tcp-connect 172.29.139.132 5000
switch(config-ip-sla-tcp)# history buckets-kept 25
switch(config-ip-sla-tcp)# history distributions-of-statistics-kept 5
switch(config-ip-sla-tcp)# history enhanced interval 900 buckets 100
switch(config-ip-sla-tcp)# history filter failures
switch(config-ip-sla-tcp)# frequency 60
switch(config-ip-sla-tcp)# history hours-of-statistics-kept 4
switch(config-ip-sla-tcp)# history lives-kept 5
switch(config-ip-sla-tcp)# owner admin
switch(config-ip-sla-tcp)# history statistics-distribution-interval 10
switch(config-ip-sla-tcp)# tag TelnetPollServer1
switch(config-ip-sla-tcp)# threshold 10000
switch(config-ip-sla-tcp)# timeout 10000
switch(config-ip-sla-jitter)# tos 160
switch(config-ip-sla-tcp)# exit
switch(config)# ip sla schedule 10 start-time now life forever
switch(config)# exit
switch# show ip sla configuration 10

Configuring a Multioperations Scheduler
switch> enable
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip sla group schedule 1 3,4,6-9
switch(config)# exit
switch# show ip sla group schedule
switch# show ip sla configuration

switch> enable
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip sla group schedule 2 1-3 schedule-period 50 frequency range 80-100
switch(config)# exit

switch# show ip sla statistics
switch# show ip sla group schedule
switch# show ip sla configuration

IP SLAs TWAMP Responder
Device# configure terminal
Device(config)# feature sla twamp-server
Device(config)# ip sla server twamp
Device(config-twamp-srvr)# port 9000
Device(config-twamp-srvr)# timer inactivity 900
Device(config-twamp-srvr)# end

Device# configure terminal
Device(config)# ip sla responder
Device(config)# ip sla responder twamp
Device(config-twamp-ref)# timeout 900
Device(config-twamp-ref)# end

Configuring Proactive Threshold Monitoring for IP SLAs Operations
switch> enable
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip sla reaction-configuration 10 react jitterAvg threshold-type immediate threshold-
switch(config)# ip sla reaction-trigger 10 2
switch(config)# ip sla logging traps
switch(config)# snmp-server enable traps ip sla
switch(config)# snmp-server host 10.1.1.1 public
switch(config)# exit
switch# show ip sla reaction configuration 10
switch# show ip sla reaction trigger 2

Configuring IP SLA PBR Object Tracking
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip sla 1
switch(config-ip-sla)# icmp-echo 10.3.3.2
switch(config-ip-sla)# exit
switch(config)# ip sla schedule 1 life forever start-time now
switch(config)# track 1 ip sla 1 reachability
switch(config-track)# exit
switch(config)# ip access-list standard ACL
switch(config-acl)# permit ip 192.0.2.0/24 198.51.100.0/24
switch(config)# ipv6 access-list IPv6ACL
switch(config-ipv6-acl)# permit ipv6 2001:DB8::/32 2001:DB8::/48
switch(config-ipv6-acl)# exit
switch(config)# route-map PBR
switch(config-route-map)# match ip address ACL
switch(config-route-map)# match ipv6 address IPv6ACL
switch(config-route-map)# set ip next-hop verify-availability 198.51.100.2 track 1
switch(config-route-map)# set ipv6 next-hop verify-availability 2001:DB8:1::1 track 1
switch(config-route-map)# set ip default next-hop verify-availability 192.0.2.2 track 1
switch(config-route-map)# set ipv6 default next-hop verify-availability 2001:DB8:0:ABCD::1 track 1
switch(config-route-map)# exit
switch(config)# interface ethernet 0/0
switch(config-if)# ip address 10.2.2.1 255.255.255.0
switch(config-if)# ipv6 address 2001:DB8::/48
switch(config-if)# ip policy route-map PBR
switch(config-if)# ipv6 policy route-map PBR
switch(config-if)# end
switch# show track 1
switch# show route-map PBR

Configuring IP SLAs DNS Operations
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip sla 10
switch(config-ip-sla)# dns host1 name-server 172.20.2.132
switch(config-ip-sla-dns)# frequency 60
switch(config-ip-sla-dns)# end

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip sla 10
switch(config-ip-sla)# dns host1 name-server 172.20.2.132
switch(config-ip-sla-dns)# history buckets-kept 25
switch(config-ip-sla-dns)# history distributions-of-statistics-kept 5
switch(config-ip-sla-dns)# history filter failures
switch(config-ip-sla-dns)# frequency 30
switch(config-ip-sla-dns)# history hours-of-statistics-kept 4
switch(config-ip-sla-dns)# history lives-kept 2
switch(config-ip-sla-dns)# owner admin
switch(config-ip-sla-dns)# history statistics-distribution-interval 10
switch(config-ip-sla-dns)# tag TelnetPollServer1
switch(config-ip-sla-dns)# threshold 9000
switch(config-ip-sla-dns)# timeout 10000
switch(config-ip-sla-dns)# end

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip sla schedule 10 life forever start-time now
switch(config)# ip sla group schedule 1 3,4,6-9 life forever start-time now
switch(config)# exit
switch# show ip sla group schedule
switch# show ip sla configuration

Configuring IP SLAs ICMP Echo Operations
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# feature sla sender
switch(config)# ip sla 6
switch(config-ip-sla)# icmp-echo 192.0.2.134
switch(config-ip-sla)# icmp-echo 2016:1:1:1::2
switch(config-ip-sla-echo)# end

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# feature sla sender
switch(config)# ip sla 6
switch(config-ip-sla)# icmp-echo 192.0.2.134 source-ip 192.0.2.132
switch(config-ip-sla)# icmp-echo 2016:1:1:1::2 source-ip 2016:1:1:1::2
switch(config-ip-sla-echo)# history buckets-kept 25
switch(config-ip-sla-echo)# history distributions-of-statistics-kept 5
switch(config-ip-sla-echo)# history enhanced interval 900 buckets 100
switch(config-ip-sla-echo)# history filter failures
switch(config-ip-sla-echo)# frequency 30
switch(config-ip-sla-echo)# history hours-of-statistics-kept 4
switch(config-ip-sla-echo)# history lives-kept 5
switch(config-ip-sla-echo)# owner admin
switch(config-ip-sla-echo)# request-data-size 64
switch(config-ip-sla-echo)# history statistics-distribution-interval 10
switch(config-ip-sla-echo)# tag TelnetPollServer1
switch(config-ip-sla-echo)# threshold 10000
switch(config-ip-sla-echo)# timeout 10000
switch(config-ip-sla-echo)# tos 160
switch(config-ip-sla-echo)# traffic-class 160
switch(config-ip-sla-echo)# verify-data
switch(config-ip-sla-echo)# vrf vpn-A
switch(config-ip-sla-echo)# end

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip sla schedule 10 life forever start-time now
switch(config)# ip sla group schedule 1 3,4,6-9 life forever start-time now
switch(config)# exit
switch# show ip sla group schedule
switch# show ip sla configuration

Configuring IP SLAs for FabricPath Echo Operation
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# feature sla sender
switch(config)# ip sla 1
switch(config-ip-sla)#fabric-path echo 1 profile 2 interface ethernet 1/0
switch(config-ip-sla-fabric)#timeout 5000
switch(config-ip-sla-fabric)#frequency 60
switch(config-ip-sla-fabric)#threshold 5000
switch(config-ip-sla-fabric)#owner admin
switch(config-ip-sla-fabric)#tag TelnetPollServer1
switch(config-ip-sla-fabric)# history buckets-kept 25
switch(config-ip-sla-fabric)# history distributions-of-statistics-kept 5
switch(config-ip-sla-fabric)# history lives-kept 5
switch(config-ip-sla-fabric)# history hours-of-statistics-kept 4
switch(config-ip-sla-fabric)# ip sla schedule 1 life 60 start-time now
switch(config-ip-sla-fabric)# end
switch(config)# show ip sla configuration
switch(config)# show ip sla statistics

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# ip sla reaction-configuration 1 react rtt action-type trapAndTrigger threshold-type

Preface
New and Changed Information
Overview
Using the Cisco NX-OS Setup Utility
---- System Admin Account Setup ----Do you want to enforce secure password standard (yes/no) [y]: y
Enter the password for "admin": Confirm the password for "admin": ---- Basic Sy
Would you like to enter the basic configuration dialog (yes/no): yes
Create another login account (yes/no) [n]:yes
Enter the User login Id : user_login
Enter the password for "user1": user_passwordConfirm the password for "user1": user_password
Enter the user role (network-operator|network-admin|vdc-operator|vdc-admin) [network-operator]: defa
Configure read-only SNMP community string (yes/no) [n]: yesSNMP community string : snmp_community_st
Enter the switch name: switch_name
Enable license grace period? (yes/no) [n]: yes
Continue with Out-of-band (mgmt0) management configuration? [yes/no]: yesMgmt0 IPv4 address: mgmt0_i
Configure the default-gateway: (yes/no) [y]: yesIPv4 address of the default-gateway: default_gateway
Configure Advanced IP options (yes/no)? [n]: yes
Configure static route: (yes/no) [y]: yesDestination prefix: dest_prefixDestination prefix mask: des
Configure the default network: (yes/no) [y]: yesDefault network IP address [dest_prefix]: dest_prefi
Configure the DNS IP address? (yes/no) [y]: yesDNS IP address: ipv4_address
Configure the DNS IP address? (yes/no) [y]: yesDNS IP address: ipv4_address
Enable the telnet service? (yes/no) [y]: yes
Enable the ssh service? (yes/no) [y]: yesType of ssh key you would like to generate (dsa/rsa) : key_
Configure NTP server? (yes/no) [n]: yesNTP server IP address: ntp_server_IP_address
Configure default interface layer (L3/L2) [L3]: interface_layer
Configure default switchport interface state (shut/noshut) [shut]: default_state
Configure best practices CoPP profile (strict/moderate/lenient/none) [strict]: policy
Configure CMP processor on current sup (slot 5)? (yes/no) [y]: yescmp-mgmt IPv4 address : IP_address
Configure CMP processor on standby sup (slot 5)? (yes/no) [y]: yescmp-mgmt IPv4 address : IP_address
Would you like to edit the configuration? (yes/no) [y]: yes
Use this configuration and save it? (yes/no) [y]: yes

Configure Replace
Distributed Packet Tracer
Device(config)#feature dpt
Device(config)#Device#Device# show dpt ? flow DPT flow results Show
Device#dpt create flow first-flow src-ipv4 192.0.2.100 dst-ipv4 x.0.0.2 Flow first-flow creat
Device#dpt apply flow first-flow Flow first-flow applied and in configured status Device# show dpt
Device#dpt start flow first-flow interval 10Flow first-flow started and in armed status
Device# show
Device#dpt start flow first-flow start-time seconds 30 end-time 23:00:00 10 September 2017
Device# Fl

Device# show dpt status flow all--------------------------------------------------------------------
Device# show dpt result flow first-flowFlow ID: first-flow Start-time [2017-09-05 11:52:20] End-t
Device# show dpt results flow first-flow detail---------------------------------------------------Re

Device# dpt stop flow first-flowFlow first-flow stopped and in configured status
Device# show dpt sta
Device# dpt release flow first-flowFlow first-flow released and in initialized status
Device#
Device# dpt delete flow first-flowFlow first-flow deleted
Device#

New and Changed Information
Overview
Configuring and Managing VSANs
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# vsan database
switch(config-vsan-db)# vsan 360
switch(config-vsan-db)# vsan 360 name test
switch(config-vsan-db)# vsan 470 suspend
switch(config-vsan-db)# no vsan 470 suspend
switch(config-vsan-db)# end

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# vsan database
switch(config-vsan-db)# vsan 50
switch(config-vsan-db)# vsan 34 interface vfc 5
switch(config-vsan-db)# vsan 10 vfc 3

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# vsan database
switch(config-vsan-db)# vsan 2
switch(config-vsan-db)# no vsan 5
switch(config-vsan-db)# end

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# vsan database
switch(config-vsan-db)# vsan 15
switch(config-vsan-db)# vsan 15 loadbalancing src-dst-id
switch(config-vsan-db)# no vsan 15 loadbalancing src-dst-id
switch(config-vsan-db)# vsan 15 loadbalancing src-dst-ox-id
switch(config-vsan-db)# vsan 23 suspend
switch(config-vsan-db)# no vsan 23 suspend
switch(config-vsan-db)# end

Configuring and Managing Zones
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# zone name test vsan 5
switch(config-zone)# member interface 4

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# zoneset activate name test vsan 34
switch(config)# no zoneset activate name test vsan 30

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# zone default-zone permit vsan 13
switch(config)# no zone default-zone permit vsan 40

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# fcalias name testname vsan 50
switch(config-fcalias)# member pwwn 4

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# zone set name new vsan 23
switch(config-zoneset)# member new
switch(config-zoneset)# zone name trial
switch(config-zoneset-zone)# member fcid 0x222222

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# zoneset distribute full vsan 12

switch# zoneset import interface 6 vsan 10
switch# zoneset export vsan 5

switch# zone copy active-zoneset full-zoneset vsan 301
switch# zone copy vsan 55 active-zoneset scp://guest@myserver/tmp/active_zoneset.txt

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# zoneset rename test myzoneset vsan 60
switch(config)# zone rename test myzone vsan 50
switch(config)# fcalias rename test myfc vsan 200
switch(config)# zone-attribute-group rename test mygroup vsan 12
switch(config)# zoneset activate name myzone vsan 50

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# zoneset clone test myzoneset2 vsan 2
switch(config)# zone clone test myzone3 vsan 3
switch(config)# fcalias clone test myfcalias vsan 30
switch(config)# zone-attribute-group clone test mygroup2 vsan 10
switch(config)# zoneset activate name myzonetest1 vsan 3

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# zone mode enhanced vsan 22
switch(config)# no zone mode enhanced vsan 30

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# zone commit vsan 679
switch(config)# zone commit vsan 34 force
switch(config)# no zone commit vsan 22
switch(config)# no zone commit vsan 34 force

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# zone merge-control restrict vsan 24
switch(config)# no zone merge-control restrict vsan 33
switch(config)# zone commit vsan 20

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# zone default-zone permit vsan 12
switch(config)# no zone default-zone permit vsan 12
switch(config)# zone commit vsan 340

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# system default zone default-zone permit
switch(config)# no system default zone default-zone permit
switch(config)# system default zone distribute full
switch(config)# no system default zone distribute full

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# no zone name myzone vsan 35
switch(config)# zone compact vsan 42

Disable Host from modifying port connectivity parameters? (yes/no) [no]: no
The following configuration will be applied:fcdomain domain 2 static vsan 1fcdomain restart disrupti

Configuring Fibre Channel Common Transport Management Security
Preface
New and Changed Information
Overview
Using the Cisco NX-OS Setup Utility
Do you want to enforce secure password standard (yes/no): yes
Enter the password for admin: admin-password Confirm the password for admin: admin-password
This setup utility will guide you through the basic configuration of the system. Setup configures on
Create another login account (yes/no) [no]: yes
Enter the user login ID: user_name
Enter the password for user_name: user-password Confirm the password for user_name: user-password
Enter the user role [network-operator]: network-admin
Configure read-only SNMP community string (yes/no) [n]: yes
SNMP community string: snmp_community

show version | begin Hardware
show running-config | count
show file testoutput | cut -b 1-10
show running-config | end interface
show interface brief | exclude down
show logging logfile | head lines 50
show interface brief | include up
show logging logfile | last 50
show interface brief | no-more
show version | sscp MyConnection show_version_output
show file testoutput | wc bytes

sjc-sw2# show ioa cluster tape_vault flows----------------------------------------------------------
sjc-sw2# show ioa cluster tape_vault flows----------------------------------------------------------

Certain N-ports in this VSAN can act as both initiator and targets

Preface
New and Changed Information
Basic Inter-VSAN Routing Configuration
switch# config tEnter configuration commands, one per line. End with CNTL/Z.switch(config)# feature
switch# show ivrInter-VSAN Routing is enabledInter-VSAN enabled switches---------------------------N
switch# config tEnter configuration commands, one per line. End with CNTL/Z.switch(config)# ivr dist
switch(config)# ivr vsan-topology autofabric is locked for configuration. Please commit after config
switch(config)# ivr commit
switch(config)# exit
switch# show ivr session statusLast Action : CommitLast Action Result : Succe
switch# show ivr vsan-topology activeAFID SWITCH WWN Active Cfg. VSANS-----------
mds(config)# ivr zoneset name tape_server1_server2mds(config-ivr-zoneset)# zone name tape_server1mds
mds(config)# do show ivr zonesetzoneset name tape_server1_server2 zone name tape_server1 pwwn
mds(config)# do show zoneset active vsan 1zoneset name finance_dept vsan 1 zone name accounts_datab
mds(config)# ivr zoneset activate name tape_server1_server2zoneset activation initiated. check inter
mds# show ivr zoneset active zoneset name tape_server1_server2 zone name tape_server1 pwwn 10:
mds# show zoneset active vsan 1zoneset name finance_dept vsan 1 zone name accounts_database vsan 1

switch(config)# switchto vdc storage
switch-storage#
switch-storage# configure terminal
switch-storage(config)#
switch-storage(config)# feature port-track
switch-storage(config)# show feature| port-track
switch-storage(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface vfc 2
switch(config-if)# port-track interface vfc-port-channel 1

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface vfc 3
switch(config-if)# port-track interface san-port-channel 1 vsan 2
switch(config-if)# port-track interface san-port-channel 1 vsan 2

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface vfc 5
switch(config-if)# port-track force-shut
switch(config-if)# no port-track force-shut

switch# terminal monitor

switch# logging event link-status default
switch(config)# show logging info
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

switch(config)# show logging module
switch(config)# logging level aaa 2
switch(config)# show logging level aaa
switch(config)# logging timestamp milliseconds
switch(config)# show logging timestamp

switch(config)# logging server 192.0.2.253 5 port 600
switch(config)# show logging server
switch(config)# copy running-config startup-config

debug.local7 var/log/myfile.log
$ touch /var/log/myfile.log$ chmod 666 /var/log/myfile.log
$ kill -HUP ~cat /etc/syslog.pid~

switch# show logging nvram last 10

switch# clear logging nvram

switch(config)# no fcdomain optimize fast-restart vsan 1

switch(config)# no fcdomain priority 12 vsan 1

Create the certificate request..Create a challenge password. You will need to verbally provide thisp

input (cut & paste) certificate in PEM format:-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----MIIEADCCA6qgAwIBAgIKCjOOoQA

switch# configure terminalEnter configuration commands, one per line. End with CNTL/Z.switch(config)
SwitchA(config)# ip domain-name example.com
SwitchA(config)#
SwitchA(config)# crypto ca trustpoint myCA
SwitchA(config-trustpoint)# exit
SwitchA(config)# show cryp
SwitchA(config)# crypto key generate rsa label myKey exportable modulus 1024
SwitchA(config)# show cr
SwitchA(config)# crypto ca trustpoint myCA
SwitchA(config-trustpoint)# rsakeypair myKey
SwitchA(config
SwitchA(config)# crypto ca authenticate myCAinput (cut & paste) CA certificate (chain) in PEM format
SwitchA(config)# crypto ca enroll myCACreate the certificate request..Create a challenge password. Y
SwitchA(config)# crypto ca import myCA certificateinput (cut & paste) certificate in PEM format:----
SwitchA# show crypto ca certificatesTrustpoint: myCAcertificate:subject= /CN=SwitchA.example.comissu
SwitchA# copy running-config startup-config

SwitchA# copy tftp:apranaCA.crl bootflash:aparnaCA.crl
SwitchA# config terminal
SwitchA(config)# crypto ca crl request myCA bootflash:aparnaCA.crl

Configuring IP Security
sw10.1.1.100# configure terminalsw10.1.1.100(config)# feature crypto ikesw10.1.1.100(config)# featur
sw10.1.1.100(config)# crypto ike domain ipsecsw10.1.1.100(config-ike-ipsec)# key ctct address 10.10.
sw10.1.1.100# configure terminalsw10.1.1.100(config)# ip access-list acl1 permit tcp 10.10.100.231 0
sw10.1.1.100(config)# crypto transform-set domain ipsec tfs-02 esp-aes 128 esp-sha1-hmac
sw10.1.1.100(config)# crypto map domain ipsec cmap-01 1sw10.1.1.100(config-crypto-map-ip)# match add
sw10.1.1.100# configure terminalsw10.1.1.100(config)# int gigabitethernet 7/1sw10.1.1.100(config-if)
sw10.1.1.100(config)# feature fcipsw10.1.1.100(config)# fcip profile 2sw10.1.1.100(config-profile)#
sw10.1.1.100# show crypto global domain ipsec security-association lifetime Security Association Lif
sw11.1.1.100# configure terminalsw11.1.1.100(config)# feature crypto ikesw11.1.1.100(config)# featur
sw11.1.1.100(config)# crypto ike domain ipsecsw11.1.1.100(config-ike-ipsec)# key ctct address 10.10.
sw11.1.1.100# configure terminalsw11.1.1.100(config)# ip access-list acl1 permit ip 10.10.100.232 0.
sw11.1.1.100(config)# crypto transform-set domain ipsec tfs-02 esp-aes 128esp-sha1-hmac
sw11.1.1.100(config)# crypto map domain ipsec cmap-01 1sw11.1.1.100(config-crypto-map-ip)# match add
sw11.1.1.100(config)# int gigabitethernet 1/2sw11.1.1.100(config-if)# ip addr 10.10.100.232 255.255.
sw11.1.1.100(config)# feature fcipsw11.1.1.100(config)# fcip profile 2sw11.1.1.100(config-profile)#
sw11.1.1.100# show crypto global domain ipsec security-association lifetime Security Association Lif
sw10.1.1.100# show crypto sad domain ipsec interface: GigabitEthernet7/1 Crypto map tag: cmap-01

sw10.1.1.100# configure terminalsw10.1.1.100(config)# ip access-list acl1 permit tcp 10.10.1.0 0.0.0
sw10.1.1.100(config)# crypto transform-set domain ipsec tfs-01 esp-3des esp-md5-hmac
sw10.1.1.100(config)# crypto map domain ipsec cmap-01 1sw10.1.1.100(config-crypto-map-ip)# match add
sw10.1.1.100# configure terminalsw10.1.1.100(config)# int gigabitethernet 7/1sw10.1.1.100(config-if)

MDS-9216# show fcsp dhchap databaseDHCHAP Local Password: Non-device specific password:******

awitch# show running-config interface vfc-po540!Command: show running-config interface vfc-po540!Tim

switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# vsan database
switch(config-vsan-db)# vsan 2
switch(config-vsan-db)# vsan 2 interface vfc 4
switch(config-vsan-db)# show vsan
switch(config-vsan-db)# copy running-config startup-config

# switchto vdc fcoe type storagefcoe#
fcoe# configure terminalfcoe(config)#
fcoe(config)# fcoe veloopback

switch(config)# vlan 200
switch(config-vlan)# fcoe vsan 200
switch(config-vlan)# exit
switch# configure terminal
switch(config)# interface ethernet 1/4
switch(config-if)# spanning-tree por
switch(config)# interface vfc 4
switch(config-if)# bind interface ethernet 1/4
switch(config)# vsan database
switch(config-vsan)# vsan 200 interface vfc 4
switch(config-vsan)# exit
switch# show vsan 200 membershipvsan 200 interfaces vfc 4
switch# show interface vfc 4vfc4 is upBound interface is Ethernet1/4Hardware is Virtual Fibre Channe

switch# setup sme

Configuring SME Tapes

Configuring SME Key Management
Provisioning Certificates
switch# configure terminalEnter configuration commands, one per line. End with CNTL/Z.
switch(config)# crypto ca trustpoint my_ca
switch(config-trustpoint)# rsakeypair my_ca_key 2048
switch(config-trustpoint)# exit
switch(config)# crypto ca authenticate my_cainput (cut & paste) CA certificate (chain) in PEM format
switch(config)# crypto ca enroll my_caCreate a challenge password. You will need to verbally provide
switch(config)# crypto ca import my_ca certificateinput (cut & paste) certificate in PEM format:----

switch# configure terminalEnter configuration commands, one per line. End with CNTL/Z.
switch(config)# crypto ca trustpoint my_ca
switch(config-trustpoint)# delete certificate force
switch(config-trustpoint)# no rsakeypair my_ca_key
switch(config-trustpoint)# delete ca-certificate
switch(config-trustpoint)# exit
switch(config)# no crypto ca trustpoint my_ca

RSA Key Manager and SME
OpenSSL> genrsa -out rt.key 1024Loading 'screen' into random state - doneGenerating RSA private key,
OpenSSL> req -new -key rt.key -x509 -days 365 -out rt.certYou are about to be asked to enter informa
OpenSSL> pkcs12 -export -in rt.cert -inkey rt.key -out rt.p12Loading 'screen' into random state - do
OpenSSL> genrsa -out client.key 1024Loading 'screen' into random state - doneGenerating RSA private
OpenSSL> req -new -key client.key -out client.csrYou are about to be asked to enter information that
OpenSSL> x509 -req -days 365 -in client.csr -CA rt.cert -CAkey rt.key -CAcreateserial -out client.ce
OpenSSL> pkcs12 -export -in client.cert -inkey client.key -out client.p12Loading 'screen' into rando
OpenSSL> req -new -key server.key -out server.csrYou are about to be asked to enter information that
OpenSSL> x509 -req -days 365 -in server.csr -CA rt.cert -CAkey rt.key -CAcreateserial -out server.ce
OpenSSL> pkcs12 -export -in server.cert -inkey server.key -nokeys -out serverpub.p12Loading 'screen'
OpenSSL> pkcs12 -export -in server.cert -inkey server.key -out server.p12Loading 'screen' into rando

Import client PKCS12 keystore to JKS keytool -importkeystore -srckeystore client.p12 -srcstoretype P
